We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re enabling a fully digital, AI-powered workflow that turns the physical world into precise, actionable data.<\/p><p>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099ve gone from 0 \u00e2\u0086\u0092 $3m in ARR in under a year, and are pacing to triple this year.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>To support this growth, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for a Growth and Success Manager who is a highly resourceful, execution-oriented operator who thrives at the intersection of go-to-market, operations, and people.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>The Role<\/strong><\/p><p>This is a high-ownership, high-exposure role working directly with leadership across sales and operations. Helping us scale how we sell, how we operate, and how we build our team.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>You will directly impact:<\/p><ul><li>How fast we grow<\/li><li>How efficiently we operate<\/li><li>The quality of our team and culture<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Do<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Launch new customers and supporting strategic accounts<\/li><li>Develop content and manage accounts on Medida's new product offerings<\/li><li>Create processes to streamline customer onboarding and product adoption<\/li><li>Work directly with the CEO on special projects for GTM<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Who You Are<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>A builder who doesn\u00e2\u0080\u0099t wait for instructions, you see what\u00e2\u0080\u0099s needed and make it happen<\/li><li>Highly organized and detail-oriented, with strong follow-through<\/li><li>Comfortable operating in ambiguity and rapid change<\/li><li>Strong communicator with a bias toward being resourceful and action<\/li><li>Energized by working across multiple domains (sales, ops, product, brand)<\/li><li>Excited to travel to meet our clients face-to-face 25% of the time<\/li><li>+4 years of experience in a customer facing role in a high growth tech, early stage tech, consulting, VC, PE or IB role<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Why Join Medida<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Work on cutting-edge AI + computer vision technology, transforming a massive industry<\/li><li>We are growing fast which means you can have a huge impact. We went from 0 to 50 customers in one year and are not slowing down<\/li><li>Be part of a rapidly scaling company with real traction<\/li><li>Get exposure to every part of the business<\/li><li>Help shape the future of how homes are designed and built<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **WHOOOA** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). These are best summed up in our company values, which are reflected in our product and in our team.<br><br>Our Values<br><br>If this sounds like you, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll fit right in.<br><br>Insert Posting and LI Wrapping Tags<br><br>Actual compensation is based on multiple factors that are unique to each candidate, including and not limited to skill set, level of relevant experience, and specific work location. Diversity in our work, our people, and our product drives creativity and innovation, entrepreneurial leadership and integrity, competitiveness, and collaboration throughout our business and in the market. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re Made Local.<br><br><\/strong><strong>Role Details<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Work Location \u00e2\u0080\u0093 Regina <\/li><li>Shift - Monday to Friday 1pm -9:30pm<\/li><li>Hourly Rate \u00e2\u0080\u0093 $23.70 - $29.26 (Graduated wage increase over 3 years)<\/li><li>Initial Posting Close Date \u00e2\u0080\u0093 July 12th, 2026<br><br><br><\/li><\/ul>Proudly independent, we are a Canadian, family-owned business. Coke Canada Bottling makes, distributes, merchandises, and sells the most-loved beverages Canadians enjoy. With over 6,000 diverse employees coast-to-coast, we operate in every province through 50+ sales and distribution centres, and five manufacturing facilities.<br><br>Coke Canada supplies some of Canada\u00e2\u0080\u0099s favourite beverage brands, and we want to continue to be the leading beverage partner in Canada, creating a better future and delivering optimism by bringing sustainable value to our employees, customers, consumers, and communities.<br><br>Advancing a high-performing, collaborative and inclusive culture is at the core of our vision to be the World\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Greatest Bottler, Built by the Best People, and we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for exceptional talent to help get us there.<br><br>For more information about Coke Canada Bottling and our products, visit cokecanada.com\/our-product.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><strong>About This Opportunity<br><br><\/strong><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><strong>Why work with us?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Join a local, family-owned business that\u00e2\u0080\u0099s part of a globally recognized brand, where you can develop your capabilities, competencies, and career.<\/li><li>Coke Canada has a culture of learning, and we offer several channels to support your development, including on-the-job training and a library of free courses for just-in-time learning.<\/li><li>We have generous referral rewards and recognition programs you can participate in.<\/li><li>We have close, local connections with the communities in which we operate across Canada. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re determined to make a positive difference in our communities; this includes opportunities for employee volunteerism.<\/li><li>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re building our business responsibly and our mission is to work Toward a Better Future Together. We have a plan that outlines how we are reducing, reusing, recycling, decreasing our carbon footprint, and using water responsibly. For more information visit cokecanada.com\/sustainability\/<br><br><br><\/li><\/ul>Coke Canada has been recognized as one of Canada\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Best Employers for Diversity, and we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re committed to fostering a diverse, equitable and inclusive workplace. Together we are creating a workplace culture that values diversity, enables inclusivity and ensures everyone feels like they belong. We are aiming to ensure our diverse workforce is reflective of the communities in which we operate. Research shows that women-identifying and other marginalized individuals often hesitate to apply unless they meet 100% of the listed qualifications. If this role excites you, even if you don\u00e2\u0080\u0099t check every box, we encourage you to apply. Your unique experience and perspective could be what we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for. Unless otherwise specified, this job post is for an existing vacancy.<br><br>Our hiring process is human-driven and does not involve AI tools for screening, assessment, or selection. For individuals requiring accommodations or support throughout the recruitment process please call 1-844-383-2653 or email HR@cokecanada.com<br><br><strong>Important<br><br><\/strong>All offers of employment at Coke Canada Bottling are conditional upon a successful background clearance obtained through our contracted third-party vendor. For nearly 30 years, we've been on a mission to produce healthy, delicious eggs and partner with family farms for meaningful impact. By raising hens outdoors as nature intended, we stay true to our roots every step of the way by keeping animal welfare, planet-friendly farming practices, and high-quality taste and nutrition at the heart of all we do, so you can always believe in what you buy.<br><br><strong>Healthy Together<br><br><\/strong>At Pete &amp; Gerry\u00e2\u0080\u0099s, we believe that when we care for each other, we all thrive. Across our farms, offices, and communities, we act as one flock \u00e2\u0080\u0094 united by respect, collaboration, and a shared commitment to doing what\u00e2\u0080\u0099s right. We create an environment where every person feels valued, supported, and empowered to grow, because our success depends on the wellbeing of the people who make our mission possible.<br><br><strong>The Role At a Glance<br><br><\/strong>As our Social Media &amp; Influencer Manager, you will take the helm of our social media platforms, ensuring Pete &amp; Gerry\u00e2\u0080\u0099s and Nellie\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Free Range deliver compelling content that breaks through the clutter, especially in the premium egg space. By creating and enacting our social media vision and strategy, your mission is to leverage social media not only to attract new shoppers but also to cultivate a base of loyal fans who actively seek out Pete &amp; Gerry\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Family of Brands on shelf. Engaging directly with shoppers, you will nurture a community of dedicated followers and advocates. Leading the conversation within our category, you'll also interact with like-minded brands and fans, educating and inspiring them to discover our products and reason for being. In collaboration with our Digital Marketing Manager, Content Creator\/Eggfluencer, Social Community Engagement Specialist, and our brand and agency teams, you are the pivotal force bringing our social narrative to life. Beyond the crucial role of amplifying our social presence, you are tasked with enriching our internal culture, helping create initiatives that promote a vibrant and inclusive workplace.<br><br><strong>How You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Create Greater Impact<br><br><\/strong>In this role, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll help deliver the highest quality product while upholding our unwavering commitment to animal welfare, food safety, and responsible farming. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll act boldly, embrace continuous improvement, and partner with teammates and customers to deliver wins.<br><br>Social Strategy, Planning, and Activation<br><br><ul><li>Develop and implement a social media strategy that enhances brand visibility and engagement across Pete &amp; Gerry\u00e2\u0080\u0099s and Nellie\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Free Range brand handles. <\/li><li>Expand and tailor the social strategy across a growing mix of platforms, including Meta, Pinterest, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Reddit, each requiring unique approaches to content, community building, and performance measurement. <\/li><li>Work with the Digital Marketing Manager and Content Creator\/Eggfluencer to establish quarterly content pillars and monthly content calendars, adopting a test-and-learn approach to uncover insights that refine our strategy and amplify our presence. <\/li><li>Oversee platform-specific execution, ensuring posts are adapted for distinct audiences while maintaining consistent brand voice and campaign alignment. This includes directly managing new platforms and guiding the Social Community Engagement Specialist or other staff where appropriate. <\/li><li>Establish a strategic posting schedule that maximizes engagement without overwhelming our audience, leveraging our tech stack and historical performance insights to inform the timing and frequency of posts. <\/li><li>Partner with internal creative teams on graphic led content, owning the process from brief to completed asset. <\/li><li>Lead writing all social post captions and managing all social content postings, including planned and ad hoc posts. Coordinate, as needed with other Pete &amp; Gerry\u00e2\u0080\u0099s corporate functional teams, especially Sales and Human Resources for periodic posts. <br><br><\/li><\/ul>Influencer Strategy, Execution &amp; Gifting Management<br><br><ul><li>Build and execute influencer campaign strategies that align with broader brand initiatives. <\/li><li>Identify, vet, and contract influencers across tiers (macro, micro, nano) and creators to authentically represent Pete &amp; Gerry\u00e2\u0080\u0099s and Nellie\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Free Range. <\/li><li>Brief influencers with clear campaign goals, creative guidelines, and compliance requirements, ensuring brand alignment in all content. <\/li><li>Develop and execute the brand's influencer and product gifting strategy to drive awareness, engagement, and earned content. <\/li><li>Own the ongoing product gifting program, coordinating creator outreach, product shipments, and launch activations. <\/li><li>Build and maintain a diverse network of influencers, ambassadors, and affiliates while identifying new partnership opportunities. <\/li><li>Measure campaign performance and optimize programs using key metrics including engagement, reach, earned media value, traffic, and sales impact. <br><br><\/li><\/ul>Social Data &amp; Analytics<br><br><ul><li>Lead social media data analytics and insights, using quantitative and qualitative data analysis to assess campaign performance, audience sentiment, competitor activations, and content engagement to inform ongoing activation. <\/li><li>Apply a test-and-learn methodology to continuously improve social media initiatives, turning data into actionable insights and strategies for growth and engagement. <\/li><li>Perform social listening to gather insights on brand perception, community feedback, and the competitive landscape. <\/li><li>Routinely report out on Social Media key performance indicators and communicate initiatives to drive improved performance over time <br><br><\/li><\/ul>Team and Agency Management<br><br><ul><li>Manage and develop the Social Community Engagement Specialist, providing direction, prioritization, coaching, and performance feedback while ensuring day-to-day engagement aligns with brand standards and overall social strategy. <\/li><li>Supervise organic social and boosting specific collaboration with our creative and media agency teams. <\/li><li>Partner with Customer Engagement Team for a strong feedback loop on shopper outreach. <\/li><li>Collaborate with PR and agency partners on influencer discovery, outreach, and campaign execution. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Bring To The Flock<br><br><\/strong>We are one team \u00e2\u0080\u0094 united by respect and a shared commitment to doing what\u00e2\u0080\u0099s right. What we do every day connects to something bigger.You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll bring your experience, perspective, and pride in your work. We value collaboration, curiosity, and diverse viewpoints \u00e2\u0080\u0094 because they make our flock stronger.<br><br><ul><li>5\u00e2\u0080\u00938+ years of experience in social media marketing, influencer marketing, digital marketing, or brand marketing <\/li><li>Experience developing and executing multi-channel social media strategies <\/li><li>Proven success managing influencer and creator partnerships from identification through measurement <\/li><li>Experience working with consumer brands (especially food, beverage, wellness, lifestyle) <\/li><li>Experience managing agency partners and freelancers <\/li><li>Budget management experience <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Should Have Deep Experience With<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Meta Business Suite <\/li><li>TikTok <\/li><li>Instagram <\/li><li>Pinterest <\/li><li>Reddit <\/li><li>YouTube <\/li><li>LinkedIn (B2B brands) <\/li><li>Sprout Social <\/li><li>Canva <\/li><li>Native platform analytics <\/li><li>Dashboard reporting <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>We Are Looking For Someone Who Is<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Highly organized <\/li><li>Collaborative <\/li><li>Creative <\/li><li>Curious <\/li><li>Adaptable <\/li><li>Strong communicator, especially written <\/li><li>Excellent negotiator <\/li><li>Detail-oriented <\/li><li>Comfortable managing multiple deadlines <\/li><li>Data-driven while remaining creatively minded <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Bonus Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience launching viral or high-performing campaigns <\/li><li>Creator economy expertise <\/li><li>UGC strategy experience <\/li><li>Video-first content experience <\/li><li>Photography\/video production understanding <\/li><li>Crisis communications experience <\/li><li>AI content workflow familiarity <\/li><li>Experience managing brand ambassadors <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Work Schedule &amp; Hours<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>This is a fully remote role with the expectation that employees are on camera during all meetings. <\/li><li>Dayshift \u00e2\u0080\u0093 Typically Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM \u00e2\u0080\u0093 5:00 PM.<\/li><li>Hours may flex or vary based on daily needs,<\/li><li>Flexibility is required.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Tending To Our Flock<br><br><\/strong>We care for our people the same way we care for our hens \u00e2\u0080\u0094 with attention, respect, and balance. Our benefits are designed to support real life and whole wellbeing.<br><br><ul><li>Medical, dental, and vision insurance<\/li><li>Paid vacation<\/li><li>Paid sick time<\/li><li>Paid volunteer time<\/li><li>9 paid holidays<\/li><li>401(k) with 4% employer match<\/li><li>Disability and life insurance<\/li><li>Opportunities for advancement<\/li><li>Maternity and paternity leave<\/li><li>Tuition reimbursement<\/li><li>Flexible Spending Account<\/li><li>Footwear reimbursement for onsite employees<\/li><li>Onsite employees receive free eggs weekly; remote employees receive coupons for free eggs<\/li><li>Breakfast or lunch events from time to time.<\/li><li>A team grounded in a shared mission: Healthy Hens, Healthy Eggs, Healthy Planet.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Equal Opportunity Statement<\/strong>Pete &amp; Gerry\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Organics is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are a community built on respect and shared purpose. Every person belongs here \u00e2\u0080\u0094 because our strength comes from the diversity of people and perspectives that make us who we are.<br><br>We are an E-Verify employer. After accepting an offer, we will use E-Verify to confirm your eligibility to work in the United States by comparing information from your Form I-9 with records from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and Social Security Administration.<br><br>Salary Description<br><br>$75,000\u00e2\u0080\u0093$85,000 annually, depending on experience<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **SINCERELY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). We deliver the technology infrastructure, operational services, and digital experience capabilities our clients need to compete and grow. Our managed services model means we are not just a software vendor; we are embedded in the day-to-day operations of our clients' institutions, accountable for outcomes, not just uptime.<br><br><strong>Role Purpose<br><br><\/strong>The SVP of Banking Operations leads the full managed services delivery function at Nymbus, spanning contact center operations, digital banking support, fraud operations, onboarding, and lending support. This leader is accountable for current-state operational excellence that keeps clients and SLAs intact while simultaneously redesigning the operating model from the ground up using AI-first principles, agentic automation, and scalable architecture.<br><br>This is a rare role. It sits at the intersection of enterprise-grade operational accountability and a genuine mandate to build something new. The right candidate will not optimize the current model. They will hold it loosely, keep it running, and replace it with something better.<br><br><strong>Why This Role, Why Now<br><br><\/strong>Nymbus is in active transformation. We are rebuilding how managed services delivers client outcomes with agentic automation and scalable process architecture as the baseline, not as an enhancement layer. The SVP of Banking Operations inherits strong day-to-day leaders and a capable team. The job is to set the strategic direction, remove the ceiling on what that team can accomplish, and build the model that serves our next 100 clients as efficiently as our first.<br><br>Banking Operations is also a revenue-generating function. This leader will work alongside sales, partnerships, and product to identify expansion opportunities within the managed services book, support client retention and upsell conversations, and build the commercial case for new service capabilities as the operating model matures.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><strong>Operational Leadership<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Own and oversee end-to-end service delivery across all managed services operational domains, including contact center, digital banking support, fraud operations, onboarding, and lending support<\/li><li>Hold SLA accountability; ensure client commitments are met consistently and predictably across the book of business<\/li><li>Lead and develop two established operational leaders and their teams; set performance expectations and optimize the layer of management beneath them<\/li><li>Serve as the senior escalation point for operational client issues requiring executive-level engagement<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>AI-First Operating Model Design <br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Lead the redesign of the Banking Operations model with agentic AI, automation, and scalability as first principles, not as additions to existing workflows<\/li><li>Partner with product, engineering, and the Applied AI Practice to identify, prioritize, and implement automation opportunities across the service delivery stack<\/li><li>Measure and report on efficiency gains, capacity freed, and quality improvements resulting from AI adoption<\/li><li>Build and maintain a clear view of where human judgment is required and where it is not; design accordingly<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Revenue and Client Partnership<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Build and maintain executive-level relationships with key managed services clients, operating as a trusted advisor in a regulated industry context<\/li><li>Partner with sales, partnerships, and client success to support upsells, contract renewals, and new client introductions<\/li><li>Identify and develop new managed services revenue opportunities, including pricing optimization, service packaging, and capability expansion<\/li><li>Represent operations in external client conversations about service evolution, roadmap, and AI-enabled capability development<\/li><li>Ensure clients experience the tangible, visible impact of operational and AI investment in their outcomes<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Organizational and Talent Development<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Hire, develop, and retain operational leaders who can execute in a transformation environment while keeping current service commitments intact<\/li><li>Build a team culture of accountability, curiosity, and continuous improvement<\/li><li>Create the internal capability to run today's model while designing and migrating to tomorrow's simultaneously<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What We Are Looking For<br><br><\/strong>We are not looking for a great operations manager in the traditional sense. We are looking for a builder who happens to be an excellent operator. The right person for this role sees AI not as a tool on top of operations but as the operating model itself.<br><br><strong>AI-First Mindset<br><br><\/strong>Has led or is deeply experienced with AI and automation adoption in an operational context. Does not treat AI as an enhancement layer. Knows how to design processes from scratch with agentic AI built in. Has an informed view of where automation creates risk in a regulated environment and how to manage it.<br><br><strong>Regulated Industry Experience<br><br><\/strong>Understands the constraints of operating in a regulated environment: compliance requirements, audit readiness, and what cannot be automated without oversight. Fintech, banking, credit union, or adjacent regulated services experience strongly preferred. Does not need to be a compliance expert; needs to know where the lines are.<br><br><strong>Transformation Leadership<br><br><\/strong>Has led a team through a meaningful operational redesign at speed. Has managed the complexity of maintaining current client commitments while building toward a fundamentally different model. Has made hard calls about what to automate, what to sunset, and what to protect.<br><br><strong>Commercial and Client Orientation<br><br><\/strong>Treats operations as a client relationship and a growth lever, not just a cost center. Has experience in client-facing operational roles or in environments where service delivery is the product. Comfortable in commercial conversations about pricing, service packaging, and capability expansion.<br><br><strong>Builder Mentality<br><br><\/strong>Energized by ambiguity and the absence of a playbook. Not looking to manage a stable operation; looking to transform one. Has designed processes, teams, and systems from scratch. Is not waiting for perfect information to move.<br><br><strong>SALARY &amp; BENEFITS:<br><br><\/strong>$175,000-200,000 Annual Salary<br><br>Annual Cash Bonus and Equity Options commensurate with the role level and experience<br><br>100% Remote<br><br>401(k) plan<br><br>Insurance - Health, Dental and Vision<br><br>Paid Time Off<br><br>Ready to join? We invite you to watch this video and learn who we are and how we build and innovates together!<br><br>Let's Go!<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **VIGILANT** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). You will help turn complex business challenges into smart integrated digital solutions for clients. With Seekrette you will be given the opportunity think big while being responsible for managing a defined group of websites, exploring exciting new business opportunities and developing customized SEO strategies to attract new online visitors. You will be the go to person to help our clients turn more leads into sales.<br><br>The ideal candidate will be responsible for the following tasks:<br><br><ul><li>Manage, develop and expand the presence of client websites you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ve been assigned<\/li><li>Develop a firm understanding of competitor strengths and weaknesses to develop powerful search engine strategies for both Seekrette and clients.<\/li><li>Work closely with other Digital Strategists to grow website traffic through various search engines and stay current with latest SEO tools, technologies and trends.<\/li><li>Identify new opportunities to build mutually beneficial partnerships to help increase website traffic growth for clients and Seekrette.<\/li><li>Accurately provide consistent content production for each assigned website.<\/li><li>Drive business decisions based on competitor research, Google analytics and data derived from latest webmaster tools<br><br><\/li><\/ul>You will be responsible for wearing many hats so the ideal candidate should organized, have good time management skills and work efficiently while having fun at the same time. If this is you, then you might be right person to join our crazy family!<br><br>INSPIRE US!<br><br>Fit the above description? We are looking forward to hear from you! Please tell\/present us:<br><br><ul><li>From your own observations, please provide three examples of emerging cultural trends (from anywhere in the world) and how you feel creatives can respond to and evolve with those trends.<\/li><li>If you have worked more than 3 years in the creative field, what are the three most important pieces of advise you would give to a young creative person just starting out. If you have worked less than 3 years, what are the three most important things you want to learn with your next career move?<\/li><li>So you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ve chosen a career in the \u00e2\u0080\u0098creative\u00e2\u0080\u0099 industries. From the time that first spark ignited somewhere deep within you to this present moment \u00e2\u0080\u0093 how have your perceptions of the business changed since you began working in the field?<\/li><li>What makes you a great and inspiring person to work with?<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Please send your cover letter, resume, and a link to your online portfolio to jobs@seekrette.com<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **GREAT** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). The pay range you see represents base salary only. In addition, your total rewards may include: semi-annual bonuses tied to business performance; Deferred Profit-Sharing Program to assist with retirement savings; comprehensive paid benefits; a 15% discount on Home Depot stock purchases; and merit-based salary increases. We are committed to recognizing your efforts and supporting your growth with us.<br><br><\/strong><strong>Are you someone who thrives on helping others succeed, enjoys making an impact, and takes pride in guiding customers to the right solutions for their projects? If you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re also naturally curious and eager to keep learning, consider starting or growing your career with us at The Home Depot.<br><br><\/strong>In our commitment to efficiency, consistency, and a fair hiring experience for all candidates, The Home Depot Canada uses<strong>Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology to assist with the screening and assessment of applicants<\/strong>for this position. Our goal is a seamless, tech-enabled mortgage process. Our primary tool is automation.<\/p><br><ul><br><li><br><p><strong>We automate mortgage origination.<\/strong> We partner with engineers and product leaders to build systems that eliminate manual toil and deliver a self-service mortgage experience. The result: rates significantly below the national average, saving clients thousands over the life of their loans.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>We're systems builders, not process followers.<\/strong> Team members execute high-quality mortgage processes while actively identifying opportunities to improve automation &amp;mdash; better logic, better design, less toil.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>We hire critical thinkers.<\/strong> We want people who don't just want better tools &amp;mdash; they think carefully about how every tool should work. Every team member understands the \"why\" behind each step.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>We operate as one integrated unit.<\/strong> We work as a single team with end-to-end fluency across the origination lifecycle. No traditional silos. This cross-functional depth is what lets us move faster, catch problems earlier, and evolve quickly.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Our interview process is intended to be insightful for you and us.<\/strong> We're charting a unique path in home lending, so mutual fit is a top priority. After a conversation with our recruiting team, you will complete a 15-20 minute take-home assignment. From there, you'll meet our mortgage operations leads before a cross-functional final round.<\/p><br><\/li><br><\/ul><br><p>If this sounds like the right fit, we'd love to hear from you.<\/p><br><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><span>Wealthfront is seeking a mortgage loan processor to join our team as we build and scale our mortgage lending operations. As a key player on the team you will leverage your expertise to work with existing Wealthfront clients providing excellent service and guiding them through the process with the support of our innovative technology and tools. This position offers an exciting opportunity to be a part of a cutting-edge team in a rapidly growing environment.&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><p><br><\/p><strong>Responsibilities<\/strong><ul><br><li>Reviews loan file and gathers any items needed for final loan approval<\/li><br><li>Liaison between all operational and sales departments in the transaction<\/li><br><li>Orders supporting documentation<\/li><br><li>Evaluates loan applications for reasonableness and, if needed, escalates files for further evaluation<\/li><br><li>Prioritizes daily workload to ensure a delightful client experience<\/li><br><li>Manages a full pipeline of assigned loans, driving files from disclosures signed through closing.<\/li><br><li>Excellent client communication skills<\/li><br><li>Communicates with third party vendors throughout the loan process to finalize the application<\/li><br><li>Ensures adherence to investor and regulatory guidelines<\/li><br><li>Proactively maintain loan pipeline, tasks and objectives<\/li><br><li>Adopts Company values in work behaviors, decision making, contributions and interpersonal interactions.<\/li><br><li>Contributes to a positive work environment by demonstrating cultural expectations and influencing others to reward performance, accountability, diversity and inclusion, flexibility, continuous development, collaboration, creativity and fun<\/li><br><\/ul><p><br><\/p><strong>Expertise<\/strong><ul><br><li>Customer-focused, business-centric, and team-oriented mindset; relentlessly passionate about finding and completing valuable work<\/li><br><li>Strong working knowledge of Federal and state regulations including TRID and HMDA<\/li><br><li>Deep understanding of mortgage loan products and underwriting guidelines<\/li><br><li>Self-driven with the ability to work independently and collaboratively<\/li><br><li>Excellent organizational skills, able to set and meet deadlines in a high paced environment<\/li><br><li>Demonstrated ability to communicate effectively and influence positive outcomes at all levels of an organization<\/li><br><li>Intellectually curious and interested in applying technology to enhance business processes<\/li><br><li>Prior experience in retail mortgage loan processing<\/li><br><li>Excellent communication skills focusing on both internal and external communications<\/li><br><li>Openness to adapting to industry changes<\/li><br><\/ul><p><br><\/p><strong>Requirements<\/strong><ul><br><li>2+ years mortgage processing experience in a retail environment<\/li><br><li>Mortgage Loan Originator License<\/li><br><li>Knowledge of Conventional Conforming and Jumbo guidelines<\/li><br><li>Experience in the non-delegated space<\/li><br><li>Understanding of state and federal lending regulations<\/li><br><li>Extensive knowledge and understanding of customer service and intrapersonal best practices<\/li><br><\/ul><\/p><p><br><\/p><br><p><span>Estimated annual salary range: <\/span><span>$56,000 - $70,000<\/span><span> plus Equity<\/span> and a discretionary bonus.<\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>Benefits include medical, vision, dental, 401K plan, generous time off, parental leave, wellness reimbursements, professional development, employee investing discount, and more!<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>About Wealthfront<\/strong><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>Here at Wealthfront, our mission is to create a financial system that favors people, not institutions. We do this by leveraging technology to build powerful, low-cost, and easy-to-use financial products that help modern investors grow and manage their money.<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>We started with the ambition to transform the investment advisory business. By automating strategies typically reserved for the wealthy, we unlocked access to high quality investment advice for a digitally-native generation that was underserved by traditional institutions. Since then, we've expanded to a full suite of products designed to help our clients turn their savings into long-term wealth, including:<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 A Cash Account that, through our partner banks, offers one of the highest annual percentage yields on uninvested cash in the industry, while providing instant and secure access to your money with no account fees and a full suite of checking features.<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 A zero-commission Stock Investing Account with 50+ handpicked collections that help DIY investors discover new companies and make smarter investing decisions.<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Multiple automated investing portfolios designed to unlock tax savings through sophisticated strategies like fixed income, tax-loss harvesting, and direct indexing&amp;mdash;which we offer at industry-leading low costs and accessible minimums.<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>Our award-winning products have attracted over 1 million clients who trust us with more than $90 billion of their hard earned savings&amp;mdash;and we're far from done. If you&rsquo;re inspired to help us reshape the financial industry as we create our next chapter, let&rsquo;s talk!<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>For more information please visit <\/span>www.wealthfront.com<span>.We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><strong>Please review our <\/strong>candidate privacy notice<span>.&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><strong>Disclosures:<\/strong><span>&nbsp;All investing involves risk, including the possible loss of principal. Tax-Loss Harvesting benefits vary depending on the client's entire tax and investment profile. Wealthfront doesn&rsquo;t provide tax advice. The Cash Account is offered by Wealthfront Brokerage LLC (\u00e2\u0080\u009cWealthfront Brokerage\u00e2\u0080\u009d), Member of FINRA\/SIPC. Wealthfront Brokerage is not a bank. We convey funds to partner banks who accept and maintain deposits, provide the variable interest rate, and provide access to FDIC pass-through insurance. Investment management and advisory services-which are not FDIC insured-are provided by Wealthfront Advisers LLC (\u00e2\u0080\u009cWealthfront Advisers\u00e2\u0080\u009d), an SEC-registered investment adviser. The checking features offered in the Wealthfront Cash Account are provided by Green Dot Bank, Member FDIC. Fees and Eligibility requirements may apply to certain checking features, please see the <\/span>Deposit Account Agreement<span> for details.<\/span><\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p>&nbsp;<\/p><br><p><span>By \u00e2\u0080\u009caward-winning products\u00e2\u0080\u009d, please refer to <\/span>www.wealthfront.com\/reviews<span> for more information.&nbsp;Wealthfront Corporation oversees Total Client Assets and Trusted Clients through Wealthfront Advisers and Wealthfront Brokerage. Wealthfront Advisers and Wealthfront Brokerage are wholly owned subsidiaries of Wealthfront Corporation.<\/span><span>&nbsp;<\/span>&nbsp;<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **WHOLEHEARTEDLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Evaluation Center (AUTEC) at Andros Island, Bahamas.<br><br>Essential functions to include:<br><br><ul><li> Ensuring the safety of all crew and passengers. <\/li><li> Managing all crew assets to safely and effectively accomplish the exercise plan. <\/li><li> Navigating the vessel in a safe manner which maximizes the exercise plan execution and minimizes risk. <\/li><li> Monitoring vessel position to ensure proper deployment of MK30 and MK39 targets and the recovery of exercise torpedoes. <\/li><li> Communicating with range control, other range assets, crew and passengers, determining corrective action in the event that the vessel experiences a system failure, and accomplishing all post mission debriefings and documentation. <\/li><li> USCG Master 100 Ton Oceans license, Radar, Bridge Resource Management, and STCW certifications and endorsements. <\/li><li> Intermediate to advanced level skills in Microsoft Office software suite - Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint. <\/li><li> Ability to communicate effectively with all levels of employees and outside contacts. <\/li><li> Strong interpersonal skills and good judgment with the ability to work alone or as part of a team. <br><br><br><\/li><\/ul>Physical Demands:<br><br><ul><li>Must be able to lift and \/or move up to 50 pounds <\/li><li>Must be able to stand and walk for prolonged amounts of time <\/li><li>Must be able to twist, bend and squat periodically <br><br><br><\/li><\/ul>SECURITY CLEARANCE REQUIRED: Must be able to obtain a security clearance at the Secret level. US Citizenship is a requirement for Secret clearance at this location.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **COMPLIANT** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Our platform \u00e2\u0080\u0094 ClinicalPRO, ResearchPRO, and DataPRO \u00e2\u0080\u0094 powers clinical research, post-market surveillance, registry management, and value-based care programs across hundreds of provider organizations and some of the largest device manufacturers in the world.<br><br><strong>About The Role<br><br><\/strong>PatientIQ is hiring its first VP of Customer Growth \u00e2\u0080\u0094 a revenue-generating commercial leader who will own net revenue retention, expansion ARR, and the strategic account program across our full customer base. This is not a traditional CS role. The VP Customer Growth carries expansion quota, builds a CS-as-revenue model, and leads a team that includes Customer Success-Enterprise, Outcomes Research &amp; Registries, and Customer Success-Specialty Practice. The incoming leader will inherit a strong team, a clear structure, and a commercially ambitious mandate: grow NRR to 120%+ while protecting and expanding relationships with some of the most consequential health systems and specialty practices in the country.<br><br><strong>Role Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Own the full NRR and expansion ARR targets for PatientIQ \u00e2\u0080\u0094 the primary commercial metric for this role<\/li><li>Lead three teams: CS Enterprise (health systems, new strategic partners), CS Specialty Practice (specialty practices), and Outcomes Research &amp; Registries (Provider, MedTech, Societies)<\/li><li>Carry and manage personal expansion quota; build and administer CSM-level expansion incentive plans tied to ARR growth<\/li><li>Own the Strategic Account Program for named accounts \u00e2\u0080\u0094 executive relationship management, multi-year expansion planning, and EBR cadence<\/li><li>Build the CS-as-revenue operating model: playbooks, tooling, metrics, and team structure that treats CS as a growth engine, not a cost center<\/li><li>Partner with the VP Provider Sales in a commercial pod model \u00e2\u0080\u0094 aligned coverage of Enterprise and Specialty accounts from sale through expansion<\/li><li>Drive the Enterprise\/Specialty Practice bifurcation to full execution: differentiated service models, CSM ratios, and segment-specific expansion plays<\/li><li>Develop and retain a high-performing team \u00e2\u0080\u0094 coaching (CS Enterprise), (CS Specialty), and (Outcomes Research &amp; Registries)<\/li><li>Oversee FY2027 headcount plan and capacity modeling<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><strong>IDEAL QUALIFICATIONS<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>8+ years in Customer Success, Account Management, or commercial CS leadership in B2B SaaS or health technology<\/li><li>Proven track record carrying and exceeding expansion quota \u00e2\u0080\u0094 you have personally owned NRR targets, not just supported them<\/li><li>Experience building CS-as-revenue models: CSM incentive design, expansion playbooks, and tech-touch at scale<\/li><li>Health system or clinical technology account management experience \u00e2\u0080\u0094 you understand how health systems buy, renew, and expand<\/li><li>Led teams of 10+ including CS Directors or senior individual contributors<\/li><li>Demonstrated ability to grow NRR from 120%+ in a prior role<\/li><li>Dual-track model experience: Enterprise and Specialty simultaneously, with differentiated service approaches<\/li><li>HubSpot CRM fluency; data-driven approach to account health and expansion forecasting<\/li><li>Ability to travel up to 50%<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><strong>WHY WORK HERE?<br><br><\/strong>PatientIQ was recently selected as one of the top 50 \"Best Small Companies to Work For in Chicago\" and we pride ourselves on our team culture and shared passion for working together to solve meaningful problems in health care to improve patient lives. Check out a few of our benefits below:<br><br><ul><li>Great Benefits - top-notch health, dental, and vision insurance. Additional perks available, including 401K<\/li><li>We are Mission Driven - our team is motivated to solve complex problems, drive medicine forward, and ultimately improve patient outcomes<\/li><li>True Idea Meritocracy - great ideas win out. We encourage all team members to challenge the status quo because our mission demands this<\/li><li>Flexible Time Off - we trust you to take the time you need when you feel it is appropriate, given your workload and responsibilities. No need to track it or save up<\/li><li>World-Class Team - we're at the top of our industry because of our employees. They're the best investment we can make, and we never forget that<\/li><li>Fast Growing - we are building the largest platform for healthcare providers, industry partners, researchers, and others to collaborate on the mission to improve patient outcomes<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **GREAT** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). We're looking for a Creative Director to elevate our brand, lead our creative team, and build a creative operation that drives trust, acquisition, and measurable business results while helping tell one of the most important missions in housing today. You'll have the opportunity to influence everything from national marketing campaigns and social content to the way members, hosts, and partners experience the PadSplit brand every day.<\/p><br><strong>The Person We Are Looking For<\/strong><br><p>We're looking for a creative leader who enjoys building as much as leading. This is a true player-coach role for someone who loves developing people, embraces AI and modern creative tools, and can balance exceptional brand storytelling with performance marketing that delivers measurable results. The ideal candidate is equally comfortable presenting creative strategy to executives, coaching designers through feedback, and rolling up their sleeves to help solve a creative challenge when needed.<\/p><br><\/p><p><p><br><\/p><strong>Here's What You'll Be Doing Day-to-Day<\/strong><br><ul><br><li><br><p><strong>Lead Creative Vision<\/strong>: Set and evolve PadSplit's creative direction across every customer touchpoint while ensuring a consistent, trusted brand experience.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Coach The Team<\/strong>: Lead, mentor, and develop designers, contractors, and agency partners while remaining hands-on in key creative initiatives.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Drive Campaigns<\/strong>: Partner with Marketing to create high-performing creative across paid, organic, lifecycle, email, social, and emerging channels.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Build Operations<\/strong>: Establish scalable creative workflows, production systems, quality standards, and resource management that enable speed without sacrificing quality.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Partner Cross-Functionally<\/strong>: Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Growth, Legal, and Operations to ensure creative is embedded early in major initiatives.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Strengthen Brand<\/strong>: Own PadSplit's visual identity, creative standards, messaging consistency, and overall brand reputation across every channel.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Leverage Customer Insights<\/strong>: Translate research, customer feedback, and performance data into stronger creative strategies and messaging.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Measure Performance<\/strong>: Use creative performance metrics, experimentation, and AI-powered workflows to continuously improve campaign effectiveness and creative output.<\/p><br><\/li><br><br><\/ul><br><p><br><\/p><strong>Here's What You'll Need to Be Successful<\/strong><br><ul><br><li><br><p><strong>Creative Leadership<\/strong>: 8+ years leading brand, marketing, or creative organizations with at least 3 years managing creative teams.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Player-Coach Style<\/strong>: Comfortable both leading others and personally contributing to creative strategy, reviews, and execution when needed.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Performance Mindset<\/strong>: Experience creating creative that not only looks exceptional but improves acquisition, conversion, and customer engagement.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Operational Excellence<\/strong>: Experience building scalable creative operations using systems, vendors, contractors, and repeatable processes.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>AI Fluency<\/strong>: Comfortable incorporating AI tools into creative workflows to improve speed, quality, and efficiency while maintaining authenticity.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Strategic Thinking<\/strong>: Ability to connect creative decisions to business objectives, customer insights, and measurable outcomes.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Cross-Functional Influence<\/strong>: Proven ability to build strong partnerships across Marketing, Product, Engineering, Legal, and Executive Leadership.<\/p><br><\/li><br><li><br><p><strong>Mission Alignment<\/strong>: Excited by using creative storytelling to build trust and advance PadSplit's mission of expanding affordable housing.<\/p><br><\/li><br><br><\/ul><br><p><br><\/p><strong>Interview Process:<\/strong><ul><br><li>Your application will be reviewed for possible next steps by the Hiring Manager<\/li><br><li>If you meet eligibility requirements, the next step would be a phone call with a member of the PeopleOps team for about thirty (30) minutes<\/li><br><li>If warranted, the next step would be a video interview with our President for one (1) hour<\/li><br><li>If warranted, the next step would be a video interview with our CEO for one (1) hour<\/li><br><li>If warranted, the next step would be a video panel interview with key stakeholders at PadSplit for two (2) hours<\/li><br><li>The panel interview will require a candidate to work on a creative assessment where you will showcase your brand and design skills to the panel for discussion.&nbsp;<\/li><br><li>If warranted, then we move to offer!<\/li><br><br><\/ul><p><br><\/p><strong>Compensation, Benefits, and Perks:<\/strong><br><ul><br><li>Fully remote position - we swear!<\/li><br><li>Competitive compensation package including an equity incentive plan and company-wide bonus opportunity<\/li><br><li>National medical, dental, and vision healthcare plans<\/li><br><li>Company provided life insurance policy<\/li><br><li>Optional accidental insurances, FSA, and DCFSA benefits<\/li><br><li>Unlimited paid-time (PTO) policy with eleven (11) company-observed holidays<\/li><br><li>401(k) plan&nbsp;<\/li><br><li>Twelve (12) weeks of paid time off for both birth and non-birth parents<\/li><br><li>The opportunity to do what you love at a company that is at the forefront of solving the affordable housing crisis<\/li><br><br><\/ul><br><\/p><p><br><\/p><br><p>We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.<\/p><br><br>Compensation is based on the role's scope, national market benchmarks, the person's expertise and experience, and the impact of their contributions to our business goals.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **MEANINGFUL** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). We believe exceptional work comes from exceptional people \u00e2\u0080\u0094 no matter their background, geography, or path. Our team spans continents, cultures, and experiences, and that diversity is one of our biggest advantages. We move fast, think boldly, and build with intention.<br><br>Our product is loved. Our customers are vocal. Our roadmap moves fast.<br><br>Feel free to join one of our upcoming public, bi-weekly Town Halls on YouTube to get a glimpse of it for yourself: https:\/\/hsptb.com\/twnhll<br><br>We are looking for a Chief Financial Officer to bring world-class financial leadership to a profitable, international, multi-entity company. Your mission: turn finance into an engine for growth \u00e2\u0080\u0094 funding the right bets, scaling operations with discipline, and building lasting value for our team and our investors. You will report to the CEO, Pierre, whose favorite fruit is Kiwi.<br><br><strong>What You Will Own<br><br><\/strong><strong>Capital and growth<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Own how we deploy capital, and make the case \u00e2\u0080\u0094 internally and externally \u00e2\u0080\u0094 for the bets worth making<\/li><li>Give leadership the clarity to invest with conviction and the discipline to scale operations profitably<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>The Financial Future Of The Company<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Build the long-term value of the business and the opportunities for liquidity that come with it, for our team and our investors<\/li><li>Be the financial principal of the company to the outside world \u00e2\u0080\u0094 the counterpart investors, partners, banks, and auditors deal with<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>A world-class finance function<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Build, hire, and lead a deliberately lean, AI-leveraged finance organization across our international group<\/li><li>Set the standard for how finance operates, partners with the business, and earns trust company-wide<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong>Hospitable is a remote-only and distributed company. You should have a strongly daily overlap across EMEA and US Eastern timezones. You will report to the CEO.<br><br>Don't tick all the boxes? Talk to us about why you're still an amazing fit. Here's what we're paying attention to:<br><br><ul><li>A CFO who has led finance through real scale and built lasting value for a company and its shareholders<\/li><li>Deep international, multi-entity, multi-currency experience<\/li><li>Command of cross-border tax and compliance, including US indirect tax, EU VAT and Australian GST<\/li><li>A recognized accounting qualification (ACCA, ACA, CIMA, or a locally accredited CPA), with real FP&amp;A and modelling depth<\/li><li>Proactive communication, high ownership, and strong autonomy in a fast-moving remote environment<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Extra special kudos if you have:<br><br><ul><li>SaaS-enabled marketplace experience: forecasting both transactional GBV and recurring revenue<\/li><li>Travel, hospitality, or proptech sector experience<\/li><li>Built a finance function from founder-run to institutional-grade<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>A supportive, radically transparent, and caring team environment, where you are trusted, not managed\u00e2\u0080\u0094and a culture that is focused on results and output<\/li><li>Cash. The total cash budget for this role is up to US$312,000 per year, depending on the cost of living in your location. We can hire talent internationally as contractors\u00e2\u0080\u0094or employees if you are based in the United States, the European Union, the United Kingdom, or Australia, taking into account payroll taxes to determine your gross compensation<\/li><li>Stock. A significant equity stake through our $HOST token (RSUs): a grant valued at US$436,800, vesting over four years (\u00e2\u0089\u0088 US$109,200.00 per year). You share directly in the long-term upside you help create<\/li><li>For US employees: healthcare (including EPO, PPO and HSA), 401(k)<\/li><li>35 days off per year, encouraged (including self-serve public holidays) and parental leave<\/li><li>Complimentary mental health and emotional support with therapists on call through Slack by Spill<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **SIMPLIFYING** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a hands-on role suited to an experienced maintenance professional with strong troubleshooting skills and the ability to safely complete a wide range of in-house repairs while recognising when specialist support is required.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Carry out daily, preventive, and scheduled maintenance across guest areas, back-of-house facilities, kitchens, docks, utility spaces, and technical plant rooms.<\/li><li>Perform practical repairs, including minor plumbing, basic electrical fault-finding, carpentry, painting, sealing, and repairs to doors, fixtures, fittings, and hardware.<\/li><li>Conduct routine inspections and basic maintenance of MEP systems, including pumps, valves, filters, HVAC equipment, water supply, drainage, and wastewater systems.<\/li><li>Support specialist contractors during servicing and repairs of generators, reverse osmosis (RO) water systems, wastewater and sewage systems, HVAC, and electrical infrastructure.<\/li><li>Maintain accurate maintenance logs, work orders, inventory of tools and spare parts, and ensure compliance with PPE requirements and safe working practices at all times.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Requirements<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>3+ years of hands-on maintenance experience within a hotel, resort, restaurant, facilities management, or MEP environment.<\/li><li>Practical skills in plumbing, basic electrical maintenance, carpentry, and general building repairs.<\/li><li>Working knowledge of pumps, drainage, water systems, and safe fault identification and reporting procedures.<\/li><li>A relevant trade certification or MEP qualification is advantageous.<\/li><li>Physically fit and capable of working in an island environment, including vessel transfers, lifting, and working at height.<\/li><li>Flexible and willing to work weekends, public holidays, and special events as operationally required.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Preferred Experience<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Previous experience in hospitality or resort maintenance.<\/li><li>Experience working in a private island or remote island environment.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Please note: We are only able to consider applicants who have the legal right to work in The Bahamas.<\/strong><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please You will envision and create innovative solutions in support of PGIM\u00e2\u0080\u0099s dynamic business strategy as well as manage established compensation processes.<br><br>Responsibilities include working with internal partners and clients to execute initiatives and creatively solve PGIM people-related compensation challenges for assigned areas.<br><br>You will develop methods to manage headcount and compensation reporting analytics, compensation expense forecasting and the year-end compensation process. You will also develop and maintain compensation structures based on benchmarking insights and support People Team partners in compensation advisory matters.<br><br>The ideal candidate will partner with the wider PGIM and Prudential Total Rewards teams, People Business Leaders, People Operations and PGIM Finance to design, streamline, and execute a wide variety of Total Reward processes, analytics, and forecasts as well as manage ad-hoc requests.<br><br>This role will work closely with colleagues across the globe, and flexibility will be required to support the team\u00e2\u0080\u0099s priorities.<br><br><strong>What You Can Expect<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Partner with People Business Leaders, People Operations, and PGIM Finance to:<\/li><ul><li>Develop and oversee a streamlined approach for headcount and compensation expense analytics including accruals, modeling and forecasting for investment professional, sales and corporate staff.<\/li><li>Manage and execute year-end compensation processes for assigned PGIM areas including compensation (salary, short-term and long-term incentives), promotions and performance management.<\/li><\/ul><li>Advise People Team and business leaders on impacts of EU Pay Transparency Directive and maintain structures that support continued compliance with our regulatory obligations.<\/li><li>Manage ongoing market data matching and job architecture, ensuring accuracy and consistency, and deliver guidance and insights to colleagues on our grade and pay structures. <\/li><li>Manage ad-hoc requests and provide day-to-day compensation consulting support to PGIM Total Rewards and the broader People Team.<br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You Will Bring<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Curiosity and creativeness: developing innovative approaches to solving compensation related challenges and improve ways of working. <\/li><li>Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail; the ability to tell a story and derive insight from analysis to impact business decisions.<\/li><li>Technical skills:<\/li><ul><li>Strong Microsoft Excel (VLOOKUP, SUMIFs, Nesting, Power Pivot Tables, Charts)<\/li><li>Exposure to Power BI, Visier and\/or other data analytics\/visualization tools and willingness to increase skill level<\/li><li>Developed AI promoting skills that support the continued use of Microsoft Co-Pilot<\/li><\/ul><li>Ability to prioritize and simultaneously execute on multiple projects with varied deadlines<\/li><li>Strong relationship-building, partnering, influencing, interpersonal and collaborative skills<\/li><li>Excellent work ethic and self-motivated; able to manage work in a high-volume and fast paced environment, juggle multiple priorities and work flexibly to extended hours as needed.<\/li><li>Experience of working with Aon and\/or WTW benchmarking data.<\/li><li>6-8 years of experience in HR Compensation roles. <\/li><li>Bachelor\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Degree<br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What will set you apart?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Financial services industry, asset management, and\/or global experience<\/li><li>Experience with position management tools\/systems<\/li><li>Experience with Workday and compensation management tools<\/li><li>Experience with Microsoft Access and Microsoft PowerPoint<br><br><\/li><\/ul>-<br><br>PGIM Ireland is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of applicants\u00e2\u0080\u0099 gender, civil status, family status, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, race or membership of the traveler community. PGIM Ireland's aim is to hire the best people for the open roles and all appointments will be made on merit.<br><br>Any offer of employment made by PGIM Ireland will be contingent on receiving satisfactory references. Applicants should be aware that background checks will be carried out on all candidates offered a position within PGIM Ireland.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **ACCURATE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Should you choose to accept, your responsibilities will encompass:<br><br><strong>Bid Management (80%)<br><br><\/strong><strong>Bid Management - End to End Bid Process Oversight<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Lead the end-to-end bid process for multiple new business opportunities and key frameworks<\/li><li>Manage timelines, documentation, and submission requirements.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Compliance &amp; Quality Assurance<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Ensure all bids comply with client specifications, internal governance and scoring criteria.<\/li><li>Review and edit content for accuracy, grammar, and impact.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Collaboration &amp; Stakeholder Engagement<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Work closely with subject matter experts in business development, commercial, and operational teams.<\/li><li>Facilitate bid kick-off and review meetings.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Tender &amp; Opportunity Management<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Identify and qualify tender opportunities across public and private sectors.<\/li><li>Monitor procurement portals and industry platforms for new bids.<\/li><li>Develop bid strategies aligned with business goals<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Proposal Writing<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Write clear, persuasive, and tailored content for bids, proposals, and tender documents.<\/li><li>Ensure consistency in tone, branding, and messaging across all submissions.<\/li><li>Translate complex technical or operational information into accessible language.<\/li><li>Maintain a library of reusable content, case studies, and credentials<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Research &amp; Intelligence Gathering<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Analyse tender documents and customer requirements.<\/li><li>Conduct competitor analysis and market research to inform bid strategy.<\/li><li>Stay up to date with industry trends and procurement practices.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Commercial &amp; Risk Management<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Prepare pricing schedules and financial models alongside Commercial Engagement team.<\/li><li>Conduct risk assessments throughout the bid lifecycle.<\/li><li>Ensure bids are commercially viable and competitive<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Post-Bid Activities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Lead debriefs and lessons-learned sessions.<\/li><li>Track bid outcomes and maintain performance reports.<\/li><li>Support client presentations and negotiations.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Business Development (20%)<br><br><\/strong><strong>Opportunities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Respond to prospect enquires<\/li><li>Identify, grow and collaborate on opportunities to ensure growth attainment<\/li><li>Develop creative pitches and propositions aimed at specific industry sectors<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Quotations, Orders, Contracts &amp; Invoicing<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Liaise with Procurement to provide quotations for service within the product\/services and price ranges defined by the Technical Architects<\/li><li>Production of contracts for services<\/li><li>Invoicing clients appropriately for any goods\/services provided and contracts initiated<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Administration<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Prepare presentations for prospect meetings<\/li><li>Ensure all sales opportunities are logged in PipeDrive and are kept up to date<\/li><li>Proactively follow up leads generated<\/li><li>Organise and host prospects at our offices (alongside Line Manager)<\/li><li>Attendance and participation at internal sales meetings<\/li><li>Handover deals won to the company\u00e2\u0080\u0099s onboarding\/project management teams<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Our perfect candidate should have a wealth of knowledge spanning various technologies and being able to use these skills to troubleshoot and deliver five star solutions that keep our clients happy is a must!<br><br>Customer service is paramount to us, which is why we only look for candidates with excellent customer facing skills and the ability to communicate effectively. Your friendly tech-savviness will truly shine here.<br><br><strong>Razorblue Requirements<br><br><\/strong>We know its unrealistic to find someone who ticks all of these boxes (extra points if you do), which is why we seek those eager to develop over time through our development resources and peer learning. If this aligns with your own personal growth mindset, we would love you to apply.<br><br><strong>Qualification<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Must hold full clean UK Driving Licence<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Experience<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Proven experience in bid writing or proposal development, ideally in a B2B or public sector environment<\/li><li>Desirable: Experience in IT, ideally for a Microsoft Partner\/Managed Service Provider<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Skills<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Excellent interpersonal skills<\/li><li>Excellent communication skills \u00e2\u0080\u0093 verbal and written<\/li><li>Ability to persuade, influence and negotiate effectively at all levels within and outside the organisation<\/li><li>Excellent telephone skills<\/li><li>Excellent organisation required<\/li><li>Ability to work on your own or as part of a team<\/li><li>Ability to build strong working relationships (internal\/external)<\/li><li>Determined, enthusiastic, reliable and sociable<\/li><li>Creative thinking and a strategic mindset.<\/li><li>Self-motivated, achievement orientated, ability to use own initiative<\/li><li>Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple deadlines<\/li><li>Familiarity with procurement portals and tendering processes<\/li><li>Proficiency in Microsoft Office and document formatting tools<\/li><li>People centric approach &amp; service<\/li><li>Excellent conversational fluency in English is required to clearly explain complex technical issues<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Continuous learning and development are central to our culture, and we heavily invest in elevating our people, not just hiring those already at an expert level.<br><br><strong>Razorblue Gives<br><br><\/strong>Working for an IT partner isn\u00e2\u0080\u0099t for the faint hearted, it requires drive, passion for technology, collaboration, and a drive to innovate.<br><br>If you want to learn more about the IT domain as a whole or specialise in one particular area, you can do that here. We are not looking for the most qualified people, but people who have a true drive to learn and a passion for the technology sector. Our learning and development opportunities, combined with our team's drive for growth, result in a high volume of promotions granted year after year.<br><br>We operate a hybrid working policy across most roles and often get asked why we haven\u00e2\u0080\u0099t made the decision to go fully remote\u00e2\u0080\u00a6 For us, natural learning opportunities are invaluable and office working enables this and has also inspired our collective culture of teamwork.<br><br><strong>Our Other Benefits Include<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Base salary of \u00c2\u00a340,000-\u00c2\u00a345,000 per annum depending on skills and knowledge<\/li><li>Hybrid working (50%)<\/li><li>Flexible working to suit your work life fit<\/li><li>25 days holidays per annum + public holidays + the ability to purchase 10 more<\/li><li>Private Health Insurance with Vitality Health<\/li><li>Your birthday off<\/li><li>Enhanced maternity, paternity, adoption leave + baby bonus<\/li><li>Fully funded training and accreditations to expand your skillset<\/li><li>Two paid charity volunteering days per year <\/li><li>Discounted Broadband<\/li><li>Life insurance<\/li><li>Quarterly team social fund<\/li><li>Cycle to Work scheme<\/li><li>Gear up with the latest tech toys through our partnership with Currys<\/li><li>Cruise around in an eco-friendly electric car with our EV Scheme<br><br><\/li><\/ul>We're committed to creating an inclusive and accessible recruitment process. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you require any reasonable adjustments to participate in our application or interview process. We're here to support you.<br><br><strong>Agencies\/Recruiters Please Note<br><br><\/strong><em>To maintain an efficient and direct application process, we ask that recruitment agencies refrain from contacting us regarding our vacancies. We encourage individual candidates to apply directly through our website, as it enables us to manage our hiring process more effectively. Razorblue does not accept unsolicited speculative CVs.<br><br>We take no liability for fees or commissions if hiring someone who applied directly or was sourced through other means. Any emailed disclaimers indicating otherwise will not supersede this policy. Candidates must be submitted only in response to specific requisitions from our talent acquisition team.<br><br>Your cooperation in this matter is greatly appreciated and contributes to our efforts in finding the best possible fit for our team. Rest assured; we'll reach out if we ever need assistance from agencies. Thanks for understanding!<\/em><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **REFORMING** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a full-time remote position based in the Philippines, supporting their Australian operations.<\/p><p>You will assess customer-submitted vehicle photos and videos, determine repair eligibility, prepare accurate repair quotes, and allocate repairs to our mobile repair technicians.<\/p><p>This role requires real-world panel beating or automotive repair experience and a strong understanding of cosmetic vehicle repairs.<\/p>\n<ul><li>Minimum 3 years' experience as a Panel Beater, Estimator, Vehicle Damage Assessor or similar automotive repair role.<\/li><li>Strong knowledge of modern vehicle construction and repair techniques.<\/li><li>Excellent understanding of cosmetic SMART repairs.<\/li><li>Ability to determine what repairs can safely and effectively be completed by a mobile repair van.<\/li><li>Ability to identify repairs that require workshop facilities or replacement parts.<\/li><li>Experience preparing repair estimates and quotations.<\/li><li>High attention to detail.<\/li><li>Excellent written English.<\/li><li>Strong computer skills.<\/li><li>Ability to work independently in a remote environment.<\/li><\/ul><p><\/p><p>Responsibilities <\/p><ul><li>Assess vehicle damage from photos and videos submitted by customers.<\/li><\/ul><ul><li>Identify repair methods suitable for mobile cosmetic repair.<\/li><li>Determine when damage requires a traditional body shop rather than a mobile repair.<\/li><li>Prepare accurate repair quotations using company pricing guidelines.<\/li><li>Estimate labour times and material requirements.<\/li><li>Assess scratches, dents, paint damage, bumper repairs, alloy wheels, mirrors and other cosmetic repairs.<\/li><li>Identify pre-existing damage and multiple repair areas.<\/li><li>Escalate complex repairs where required.<\/li><li>Liaise with customer service, sales and scheduling teams.<\/li><li>Maintain fast turnaround times while ensuring assessment accuracy.<\/li><li>Keep detailed assessment notes within the CRM.<\/li><\/ul><p><\/p><p>Highly Regarded<\/p><ul><li>Experience with cosmetic\/mobile repair businesses.<\/li><li>Knowledge of Australian vehicle repair standards.<\/li><li>Experience working There may be upcoming roles that aren't listed yet, and we're always keen to talk to exceptional people excited to join our mission.<br><br>What We Offer<br><br><ul><li>Challenging work at the frontier of AI-native healthcare<\/li><li>In-person collaborative culture in a beautiful work space in the Cambridgeshire countryside<\/li><li>An onsite gym and digital health subscription of your choice<\/li><li>Early stage equity with employee-friendly terms (via an EMI scheme)<\/li><li>Comprehensive medical coverage (including dental and optical) and life insurance<\/li><li>Optional remote working on Wednesdays, with an annual allowance of 10 extra remote days<\/li><li>Desk setup allowance for your favourite keyboard \/ mouse \/ whatever!<\/li><li>Monthly team feasts (and the BBQ is used most days)<\/li><li>A fast paced work environment geared towards excellence and professional growth (with annual training budget)<\/li><li>A chance to have a big impact in a small team transforming care and outcomes at population scale<br><br><\/li><\/ul><br><br><strong>About Flok<br><br><\/strong>More than <strong>a billion people<\/strong> a year suffer unnecessarily from conditions like MSK pain, where the right treatment approach is well-established but undeliverable at scale. We're changing that. Our team has deep expertise across clinical, engineering, and regulated AI, has a track record of healthtech innovation, and is backed by top VCs and multiple unicorn founder angels.<br><br><br><br><strong>If You Like<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Solving hard problems at the intersection of technology and healthcare<\/li><li>The pursuit of excellence\u00e2\u0080\u0094helping each other to do the best work of our careers<\/li><li>Working in an in-person collaborative environment<\/li><li>Taking ownership to have significant impact in a fast-growing mission-driven company with big ambitions<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Then you'll fit right in!<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **CONCISE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Reporting to the Integrated Services Manger, your main responsibilities will entail high volume accommodation check-ins and flight bookings, data entry, database maintenance and receptionist duties.<br><br>This is a local hire role meaning you need to live in Weipa and surrounding suburbs however we will consider fly in fly out from Cairns for the right applicant.<br><br><strong>About You<br><br><\/strong>You will consider yourself a well organised, self-motivated individual and hospitality professional with the ability to the below criteria:<br><br><ul><li>Accommodation reservation experience (In-flight) preferable in a remote village, resort or similar environment<\/li><li>Administration experience supporting a very fast paced team<\/li><li>Inflight Accommodation system knowledge desirable but not essential<\/li><li>Intermediate to advanced proficiency in MS Office Suite <\/li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills are essential<\/li><li>Proven ability to listen to customer needs, exceed expectations and provide outstanding customer service in a friendly manner<\/li><li>Open C class Driver Licences is essential<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>So what next? <br><br><\/strong>If this sounds like the right job for you, please apply.<br><br><strong>About Sodexo<br><br><\/strong>Sodexo provides a range of services at remote locations across Australia, servicing both on-shore and off-shore sites, in difficult and challenging environments. At Sodexo, our Energy &amp; Resources segment serves four markets: Mining, Offshore &amp; Marine, Onshore Energy, and Engineering &amp; Construction Projects. Our growing team of employees is dedicated to improving productivity, building meaningful client relationships, reducing on-site problems and improving quality of life for the thousands of Australians who call our remote sites home.<br><br><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong>Full Drivers License<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **CASHBACKS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=).
