You'll play a key role in maintaining high standards of cleanliness and hygiene, monitoring health and safety, overseeing site security and supervising cleaning staff. This is a varied, hands on role where you'll use your initiative, organise workloads and help keep the school running smoothly.<br><br>As a visible and valued member of the school community, you'll build positive relationships with staff, students and visitors while working closely with colleagues across the Department of Education, Sport and Culture. Use your organisation, communication and problem solving skills in a role that offers variety, responsibility and the opportunity to take ownership of a safe and welcoming environment for everyone who uses the school. Apply today!<br><br><strong>A workplace that invests in you<br><br><\/strong>A competitive salary that increases each 12 months until you reach the salary maximum.<br><br>Annual leave starting from 21 days, a Privilege Day and 10 Bank Holidays; your annual leave will increase after your first year and again after your third year.<br><br>Subject to meeting eligibility criteria, the IOM Public Service offers two pension arrangements: the Isle of Man Government Unified Scheme 2011 or the Isle of Man Government Defined Contribution (DC) Arrangement.<br><br>Access to the Learning, Education and Development training facility, which is exclusively for Public Service employees, to keep on top of your continuous professional development.<br><br>Discounted access to the NSC gym and island swimming pools as well as 1-to-1 support programmes and exercise classes with qualified instructors.<br><br>Free access to the Isle of Man Government Staff Welfare Service which offers professional counselling, emotional support and signposting on a wide range of issues.<br><br>Ability to apply for an unpaid career break after 3 years\u00e2\u0080\u0099 service.<br><br>Access to the Isle of Man Public Service Cycle to Work scheme after your first year of employment.<br><br>Free car parking.<br><br><strong>Working for the Isle of Man Public Service<br><br><\/strong>We are the largest employer on the island delivering a diverse range of services to the people of the Isle of Man. We are happy to discuss flexible working arrangements where possible and if interested you should discuss this with the Recruiting Manager.<br><br>The Isle of Man Public Service is committed to creating an inclusive culture that celebrates . We pride ourselves on efficiency, accuracy, and meeting strict industry standards. We are currently seeking a highly skilled, detail-oriented <strong>Remote Mitigation Restoration Estimator<\/strong> to join our team.<br><br>If you are a self-motivated professional who thrives under compliance metrics and knows the ins and outs of restoration estimating, we want to hear from you!<br><br><strong>Position Overview<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Job Type: Full-Time, Permanent<\/li><li> Location: 100% Remote (Must operate on EST Time Zone)<\/li><li> Hours: Monday \u00e2\u0080\u0093 Friday, 8:00 AM \u00e2\u0080\u0093 5:00 PM EST (Weekend work required as needed to maintain TPA compliance)<\/li><li> Experience Level: 3\u00e2\u0080\u00935 Years<\/li><li> Target Compensation: ~$100,000 first-year combined earnings (Competitive Base Salary + Performance Bonus &amp; Commissions)<br><br><\/li><\/ul>As a Remote Mitigation Estimator, you will review scope notes, moisture logs, and photos to draft accurate, timely insurance mitigation estimates (Water, Fire, Smoke, Mold, EMS, etc.). You will act as the critical bridge between our field teams, insurance adjusters, and Third-Party Administrators (TPAs) to ensure strict program compliance and swift approvals.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Dual-Platform Estimate Generation: Write comprehensive, accurate mitigation estimates for Water, Fire, Smoke, Mold, and Emergency Mitigation Services (EMS) using both Xactimate and Symbility.<\/li><li> TPA Compliance Management: Navigate, upload, and manage strict compliance metrics within major TPA programs (Alacrity, Sedgwick, Lionsbridge, Westhill, etc.).<\/li><li> Scope Verification: Review field documentation, sketches, photos, and psychrometric logs to ensure the scope of work aligns with IICRC standards and carrier guidelines.<\/li><li> SLA &amp; Queue Maintenance: Monitor assignment queues daily\u00e2\u0080\u0094including weekends as necessary\u00e2\u0080\u0094to ensure all TPA Service Level Agreements (SLAs) are strictly met.<\/li><li> Negotiation &amp; Approvals: Communicate professionally with insurance adjusters and TPA auditors to justify estimates, resolve discrepancies, and secure timely approvals.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Must-Haves<br><br><\/strong><strong>Qualifications &amp; Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> 3 to 5 years of dedicated experience writing insurance mitigation estimates within the property restoration industry.<\/li><li> Expert-level proficiency in BOTH Xactimate and Symbility platforms. (Candidates without dual-platform experience will not be considered).<\/li><li> Extensive, hands-on experience working with TPAs (specifically Alacrity, Sedgwick, Lionsbridge, Westhill, etc.) and a deep understanding of their compliance metrics.<\/li><li>Ability to work consistently on EST hours (8:00 AM \u00e2\u0080\u0093 5:00 PM) and the flexibility to work weekends to keep estimates compliant.<\/li><li> Submission Requirement: Must be able to provide 3 to 5 previously approved, redacted mitigation estimates during the interview process to qualify.<\/li><li>A reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free home office setup.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Nice-to-Haves<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Active IICRC Certifications (WRT, ASD, AMRT, FSRT).<\/li><li>Experience with job management software like Restoration Manager, Dash, or Encircle.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> High Earning Potential: We offer an extremely competitive base salary coupled with an aggressive bonus and commission package, tracking first-year combined earnings at ~$100,000 annually.<\/li><li> Full Benefits: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision benefits available immediately following a successful 90-day probationary period.<\/li><li> Work-Life Balance: 100% remote autonomy from your home office.<\/li><li> Tech Allowance: Company-provided hardware and necessary software licenses (Xactimate\/Symbility).<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>How To Apply<br><br><\/strong>If you meet the qualifications and are ready to leverage your TPA expertise for a lucrative career from home, please submit your resume today.<br><br><strong>\u00e2\u009a\u00a0\u00ef\u00b8\u008f IMPORTANT NOTE TO APPLICANTS:<\/strong> To be considered for this role, you <strong>must<\/strong> attach or be prepared to submit <strong>3 to 5 written estimates<\/strong> that have been previously approved by a carrier\/TPA (please redact all sensitive customer information).<br><br>This is a remote position.<br><br>Compensation: $90,000.00 - $100,000.00 per year<br><br>Picture yourself here fulfilling your potential.<br><br>At SERVPRO\u00c2\u00ae, you can make a positive difference in people\u00e2\u0080\u0099s lives each and every day! We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re seeking self-motivated, proactive, responsible, and service-oriented teammates to join us in our mission of helping customers in their greatest moments of need by repairing and restoring homes and businesses with an industry-leading level of service. With nearly 2,000 franchises all over the country, finding exciting and rewarding SERVPRO\u00c2\u00ae career opportunities near you is easy! We look forward to hearing from you.<br><br><em>All employees of a SERVPRO\u00c2\u00ae Franchise are hired by, employed by, and under the sole supervision and control of an independently owned and operated SERVPRO\u00c2\u00ae Franchise. With over $8 billion in annual revenue and a blue-chip client base, ABM delivers innovative technologies and sustainable solutions that enhance facilities and empower clients to achieve their goals. Committed to creating smarter, more connected spaces, ABM is investing in the future to meet evolving challenges and build a healthier, thriving world. ABM: Driving possibility, together.<br><br>ABM is an Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) employer that does not discriminate on the basis of any trait or characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law, including disability and protected veteran status. ABM is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodation to individuals with disabilities. We will provide you with assistance and make a determination on your request for reasonable accommodation on a case-by-case basis.<br><br>ABM participates in the U.S. Department of Homeland Security E-Verify program. E-Verify is an internet-based system used to electronically confirm employment eligibility.<br><br>ABM is a military-friendly company proudly employing thousands of men and women who have served in the U.S. military. With ABM, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll have access to a world-class training program and ample opportunities to use the skills you developed while serving our country. Whether you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for a frontline or professional position, you can find post-military career opportunities across ABM.<br><br>ABM directs all applicants to apply at www.abm.com\/careers . We are passionate about travel, culture, music and bringing people together. Our team is the heart of our brand, and we believe in creating spaces that feel like home while delivering next level service in a fun, energetic environment.<br><br>We create places where you can be yourself, enjoy coming to work and feel part of something bigger than just a job.<br><br><strong>As our journey begins, we're looking for a Housekeeper with immediate starts available - someone who takes real pride in the details, finds satisfaction in a perfectly turned room and understand that their work is at the very heart of the guest experience. This is where you come in.<br><br><\/strong><strong>Your Part in the Kabannas Story<br><br><\/strong>As part of our Housekeeping Team, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll help create the spaces where our guests can truly relax, recharge and feel at home. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re the one behind the scenes making the magic happen - bringing care, attention and pride to every room and shared space.<br><br><strong>Key responsibilities:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Prepare and maintain guest rooms to a high standard, ready to welcome every arrival<\/li><li>Keep shared spaces clean, organised and inviting throughout the day<\/li><li>Work closely with your team and other departments, keeping communication clear and positive<\/li><li>Spot and report any maintenance or safety issues.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Who You Are<br><br><\/strong>You take pride in the details - creating spaces that feel calm, clean and cared for.<br><br>Ideally, you:<br><br><ul><li>Enjoy creating clean, welcoming environments where people feel at ease<\/li><li>Are reliable, consistent and take ownership of your work<\/li><li>Work well as part of a team and keep a positive attitude throughout<\/li><li>Stay organised and manage your time effectively<\/li><li>Notice the little things that make a big difference<\/li><li>Care about quality, presentation and the guest experience<br><br><\/li><\/ul>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re not looking for the perfect CVs, but for <strong>great humans<\/strong>.<br><br><strong>Why Kabannas?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>A team-first culture and some really good people around you<\/li><li>Real development and career growth - we're building something here, and we want you to grow with it<\/li><li>Rewards, recognition and experiences that go beyond the day-to-day<\/li><li>Free and discounted stays, plus generous food &amp; drink discounts, for you, your friends and your family (fair warning: you're about to become very popular)<\/li><li>Your birthday off, on us<\/li><li>Paid volunteering, enhanced family leave, health &amp; life cover<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Be part of a fast-growing, modern hospitality brand doing things differently - where you can bring your energy, style and individuality every day.<\/strong><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **ARDOR** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). You will contribute to a wide range of digital projects, working alongside Creative Directors, Art Directors, and Senior Designers to develop concepts, refine executions, and deliver polished work across static and video formats. The ideal candidate has strong design fundamentals, a curiosity for how digital experiences are built, and a drive to grow within a collaborative creative environment.<br><br><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><strong>What you'll do:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Design digital assets, visual concepts, and production-ready work across a variety of client projects<\/li><li>Collaborate with Art Directors and Senior Designers, incorporating feedback and pushing the work forward<\/li><li>Contribute to moodboards, style frames, storyboards and exploratory concepting<\/li><li>Bring curiosity about UI, motion, and interaction to your work \u00e2\u0080\u0094 even when it's not your primary task<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You'll Bring<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>2\u00e2\u0080\u00934 years of design experience with a portfolio that shows range and craft<\/li><li>Proficiency in Figma and Adobe CC Suite<\/li><li>Strong foundation in typography, layout, and visual communication<\/li><li>An eye for motion and UI \u00e2\u0080\u0094 you're aware of how digital experiences behave, not just how they look<\/li><li>Eagerness to learn, take feedback well, and do your best work in a collaborative environment<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong>We're a digital design studio in Los Angeles built on the belief that creativity and technology are better together. Our team is diverse, multidisciplinary, and deeply invested in the craft. We work with brands across industries, from emerging startups to household names, on projects that push what digital can do.<br><br>If you're looking for a place where your ideas are heard, your growth is supported, and the work actually matters\u00e2\u0080\u0093we'd love to meet you.<br><br>Freelance day rate ranges from $375-$450 depending on skill level &amp; experience.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **MIRACULOUSLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Headlined by its flagship brands, Kichler and Progress Lighting, Coleto Brands provides residential lighting fixtures across key categories, including interior and exterior decorative lighting, bath\/vanity, architectural systems and downlights, ceiling fans and landscape. Visit www.coletobrands.com.<br><br><strong>Job Description<br><br><\/strong>Coleto Brands, parent company of Progress Lighting and Kichler, is seeking a <strong>Senior Director of Brand Marketing <\/strong>to join our team. This role is responsible for defining, elevating and protecting the brand strategy across Coleto Brands. You will lead a high-functioning brand marketing team to drive a cohesive brand architecture, translate brand strategy into impactful integrated marketing programs, and ensure alignment with business objectives to fuel growth, differentiation and brand advocacy. As a senior leader within the organization, you will also closely collaborate with cross-functional colleagues to ensure corporate and go-to-market brand consistency across all touchpoints, delivering best-in-class brand experiences for customers and consumers. This role is both strategic and hands-on, flexing as needed to build strong, enduring brands that resonate with target audiences across all channels.<br><br>The ideal candidate will possess an entrepreneurial spirit and a passion for brand building across all touchpoints. You will work closely with internal colleagues and external agency partners to develop and implement brand marketing initiatives that elevate the Kichler and Progress Lighting brands among their target audiences while also supporting business needs. You will keep a pulse on marketing, industry, consumer and cultural trends to identify relevant opportunities for on-going brand growth. As the functional team lead, you will also play a key role in developing and mentoring a team of direct and indirect. You will be responsible for developing and monitoring key performance indicators as well as providing updates to senior management, therefore a strong business acumen will be a critical success factor.<br><br><strong>Duties and Responsibilities:<br><br><\/strong><strong>Brand Architecture, Strategy &amp; Portfolio Management<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Develop and maintain a clear, scalable brand architecture across corporate and flagship brands<\/li><li>Responsible for the role and relationship of each brand within the portfolio<\/li><li>Define, lead and socialize individual brand strategies for Coleto Brands and its portfolio, aligning with business objectives and growth priorities<\/li><li>Establish clear brand positioning, value propositions, and messaging frameworks for each brand to drive interest and advocacy among each brand\u00e2\u0080\u0099s target audiences<\/li><li>Identify market trends, competitive dynamics, and customer insights to inform brand direction<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Brand Stewardship &amp; Governance<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Serve as the guardian of brand integrity and consistency across all touchpoints<\/li><li>Establish brand standards, guidelines, and governance processes<\/li><li>Ensure consistent execution across all brand touchpoints, including websites, literature, packaging, events, media channels, content and in-store\/showroom merchandising<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Go-to-Market Brand Leadership<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Partner with product marketing, sales, and channel teams to bring brand strategy to life through all go-to-market executions and new product launches<\/li><li>Oversee the development of integrated campaigns that build awareness, consideration, and advocacy<\/li><li>Ensure brand storytelling is compelling, differentiated, and resonates with each brand\u00e2\u0080\u0099s target audiences<\/li><li>Lead cross-functional teams to bring brand strategy to life in our owned experience centers (Progress Experience Center, Kichler Experience Center, Kichler Boutique at High Point) through physical space design, event programming and activations<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Customer Events &amp; Tradeshows<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Lead brand strategy and execution for customer events, trade shows, and experiential marketing<\/li><li>Ensure all brand activations deliver a cohesive, differentiated, and memorable brand experience<\/li><li>Partner with sales and product teams to maximize event impact<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Customer &amp; Market Insights<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Leverage research, data, and insights to continuously refine brand strategy<\/li><li>Establish, track and report on brand KPIs that reflect brand health and market impact<\/li><li>Translate insights into actionable strategies that drive growth<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Cross-Functional Leadership<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams and executive leadership to ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints<\/li><li>Act as a strategic advisor to leadership on brand-related decisions<\/li><li>Align teams around a shared brand vision and priorities<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Team Leadership &amp; Development<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Build, lead, and mentor a high-performing brand marketing team<\/li><li>Foster a culture of creativity, accountability, and collaboration<\/li><li>Manage agency relationships and external partners<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><strong>Skills and Experience:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>A Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration or Communications is required<\/li><li>A minimum of 12 years as a brand strategist or similar brand marketing role is required<\/li><li>Proven track record of building and scaling multi-brand portfolios<\/li><li>Deep expertise in brand strategy, architecture, integrated marketing, and digital brand experiences<\/li><li>Strong creative instincts with the ability to guide and evaluate creative work<\/li><li>Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills<\/li><li>Data-driven mindset with the ability to balance analytics and intuition<\/li><li>A strong business acumen and the ability to align brand success with business performance<\/li><li>Solutions-oriented, entrepreneurial mindset, able to seamlessly flow between high-level strategy and hands-on execution<\/li><li>Experience leading corporate communications and large-scale brand activations\/events is preferred<\/li><li>Experience in consumer goods, home, lifestyle, or design-driven categories is preferred<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Travel requirements: 15% domestic travel<br><br><em>Applicants must be authorized to work for any employer in the U.S. We are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment Visa at this time<\/em><em>.<br><br><\/em><strong>Additional Information<br><br><\/strong><em>We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Born out of Milk, a creative hub in downtown New York City, innovation, self-expression, and community are at the heart of everything we do. We believe beauty isn\u00e2\u0080\u0099t about how you do your makeup, it\u00e2\u0080\u0099s what you do in it\u00e2\u0080\u0094and how you Live Your Look\u00e2\u0080\u0094that matters.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Who YOU are: <\/strong><\/p><p>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 <strong>Community connector<\/strong>: You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re always thinking about how to improve your and your community\u00e2\u0080\u0099s future. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re passionate about building a global community where everyone can feel seen and inspired in beauty.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 <strong>Courageous but chill: <\/strong>Wherever you come from, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re driven by the hardworking New York spirit that Milk embodies. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re flexible and ready to get the job done, but you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re humble and make moves thoughtfully. You strive for quality, have fun doing it, and always have the greater good of the brand in mind.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 <strong>Fearlessly innovative: <\/strong>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re not afraid to take calculated risks and enjoy problem solving. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re down to disrupt the status quo and innovate in order to raise the bar. You value a forward-thinking space that encourages you to lead change, never follow.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 <strong>Champion of self-expression:<\/strong> You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re creative at heart and are always genuinely <em>you<\/em>. You live your look and want to grow with people who celebrate individuality.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>\u00e2\u0080\u00a2 <strong>Inclusive + mindful:<\/strong> You believe an open mind is always the best place to start and value active listening. You embrace differences and help foster a safe working environment for yourself and your peers.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>The ROLE:<\/strong><\/p><p>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for a social-first copywriter to support the editorial team.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><em>Please note this is a part-time, freelance opportunity. <\/em><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>What YOU\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll do:<\/strong><\/p><p><u>Key priority:<\/u> write, edit, and collaborate with the team on all organic &amp; paid social copy including but not limited to:<\/p><ul><li>Organic captions and supers (when applicable) for all Milk social platforms<\/li><li>Reviewing assets with copy when available<\/li><li>Staying up to date on latest product positioning via check ins with the editorial team so that social copy always aligns to latest strategy + best practices<\/li><li>Check in with Editorial Director when copy needs to be reviewed + approved or to flag any questions or concerns<\/li><li>Working with the paid and DTC team to support their business needs including Demand Gen + PMAX Ad copy<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><u>Secondary<\/u>: ad hoc, one off copy needs as they arise including brainstorming, product name ideation, etc<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099d like YOU to have:<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Must be available Monday-Friday with a flexible hourly schedule based on team needs.<\/li><li>Flexible hours required, including occasional weekend availability to support the team during peak captioning periods<\/li><li>Max 20hrs a week.<\/li><li>Beauty experience a major plus<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **PROTECTION** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Broadly recognized as one of the country's most elite luxury travel services. A key benefit of membership is dedicated, unbiased service from a highly experienced travel team. Marchay offers unlimited, bespoke trip planning and execution, access to pre-vetted private homes and villas, and preferred partner benefits at over 1,200 luxury hotels worldwide.<br><br><strong>Role Summary<br><br><\/strong>The Director of Service is responsible for leading Marchay's Service team and ensuring exceptional member experiences through strong leadership, performance management, training, and operational excellence. This role owns service team performance, member retention initiatives, service standards, escalation management, advisor development, and key industry relationships. The Director of Service serves as the senior leader for the Service team and partners closely with Membership, Operations, and Executive Leadership to support company growth, capacity planning, and organizational objectives.<br><br><strong>Core Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><strong>Member Experience &amp; Service Excellence<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Lead efforts to elevate the member experience across the Service team<\/li><li>Define, reinforce, and improve service standards to ensure a consistent, high-touch member experience<\/li><li>Identify service gaps and recommend improvements in partnership with leadership<\/li><li>Ensure adherence to service expectations and service level agreements (SLAs)<\/li><li>Support timely and seamless member onboarding and transitions in partnership with internal teams<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Escalation Management<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Serve as a senior point of contact for resolving complex member issues and service escalations<\/li><li>Manage both internal and external escalations, including team-related issues and member-facing issues<\/li><li>Partner with leadership and advisors to de-escalate problems and create effective resolutions<\/li><li>Help build clear escalation pathways and response expectations across the Service team<\/li><li>Lead member feedback conversations and service recovery efforts<\/li><li>Partner directly with members when issues arise to preserve relationships and protect retention<\/li><li>Identify recurring member concerns and implement corrective actions across the organization<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Team Leadership, Training &amp; Development<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Oversee service team development, including training, mentorship, and performance management<\/li><li>Act as a trusted coach and resource for advisors and service team members<\/li><li>Help define clearer roles, responsibilities, and KPIs across the Service team<\/li><li>Support career development and skill-building across service functions<\/li><li>Own advisor onboarding and foundational training for all new Service Team members<\/li><li>Establish career pathways and development plans for advisors and service team members<\/li><li>Create ongoing coaching and mentorship programs designed to elevate advisor performance and consistency<\/li><li>Ensure performance review processes, development plans, and coaching cadences are consistently executed across the organization<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Service Operations &amp; Cross-Functional Coordination<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Partner closely with leadership and operations to improve service workflows and team effectiveness<\/li><li>Help implement scalable processes that improve consistency without requiring this role to own every operational task<\/li><li>Contribute to service-related KPIs and metrics, while partnering with operations or leadership on reporting and broader analytics as needed<\/li><li>Support capacity planning and team structure discussions to help ensure strong coverage and sustainable growth<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Strategic Partnerships &amp; External Relationships<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Manage strategic partnerships with key suppliers and ensure alignment with company goals<\/li><li>Serve as a primary point of contact for SmartFlyer-related service matters, depending on organizational structure and future partnership plans<\/li><li>Help maintain key external relationships that support service delivery and problem-solving<\/li><li>Develop and maintain senior-level relationships with luxury travel suppliers, hotel partners, DMCs, airline partners, and representation companies<\/li><li>Serve as the primary service contact for strategic external partnerships and consultants<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Trade Shows, FAMs &amp; Industry Coordination<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Maintain appropriate relationships with industry contacts relevant to trade shows and partner opportunities<\/li><li>Oversee or coordinate trade show attendance for advisors, including allocation planning and communication<\/li><li>Support management of FAM trip processes and advisor participation in line with company policies and budgets<\/li><li>Establish fair and transparent processes for FAM and tradeshow participation<\/li><li>Ensure FAM opportunities align with advisor development goals and company priorities<\/li><li>Monitor participation and return-on-investment from educational travel opportunities<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Service Team Performance &amp; Retention Ownership<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Own all Service Team KPIs and performance outcomes<\/li><li>Monitor and drive achievement of service standards, SLAs, and member experience metrics across all teams<\/li><li>Track and improve key performance indicators including member retention, Net Dollar Retention, answered call percentage, email response times, SLA adherence, member onboarding timelines, escalation resolution times, and team productivity metrics<\/li><li>Partner with leadership to identify trends, performance gaps, and opportunities for improvement<\/li><li>Ensure consistent service delivery across all teams and pods<\/li><li>Develop accountability structures and reporting mechanisms to support continuous improvement<\/li><li>Provide backup Travel Advisor support and collaborate across teams to ensure seamless service delivery and exceptional member experiences when additional assistance is needed<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><strong>CORE REQUIREMENTS<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>8-10+ years of experience in luxury travel, hospitality, service leadership, or a related high-touch client environment<\/li><li>At least 5 years of experience as a luxury travel advisor<\/li><li>Meaningful people leadership or team mentorship experience<\/li><li>Strong experience handling escalations, service recovery, and complex client situations<\/li><li>Deep understanding of high-touch service expectations and advisor support in a luxury environment<\/li><li>Experience creating structure, training, and process improvements within growing teams<\/li><li>Familiarity with travel industry partnerships, host agency relationships, and advisor support models<\/li><li>Available during Eastern Time business hours and for weekend and holiday team coverage<\/li><li>Bachelor's degree<\/li><li>Experience managing supplier relationships and working with We are Flalingo, a vibrant language learning garden with thousands of students worldwide, teaching English through live online lessons. With the magical touch of Generative AI, we offer our students a personalized and interactive learning journey.<br><br>How about being a part of Flalingo's colorful world from the comfort of your home? You'll teach students from all around the globe, helping them improve their language skills and inspiring them along the way. Plus, you'll play an active role in our community of thousands of tutors, shaping the future of Flalingo!<br><br><strong>What We're Looking For<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>You should have high-speed internet, a modern computer, and a cozy workspace at home.<\/li><li>You should have at least two years of experience teaching English to kids between the ages of 4 and 12.<\/li><li>You should use play-based and interactive teaching methods in your lessons.<\/li><li>You should be experienced in giving live online lessons and focused on improving speaking skills.<\/li><li>If you've been involved in speaking clubs before, we assure you that our Tutor Community Manager will put a star on your resume!<\/li><li>You should be tech-savvy and comfortable with online teaching tools.<\/li><li>You should have excellent English communication skills.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Degree in English Language Teaching, English Language and Literature, Translation &amp; Interpretation, or related fields<\/li><li>Preferably holds a teaching certificate (pedagogical formation)<\/li><li>Commitment: Minimum of 30 hours per week.<\/li><li>Minimum 2 years of experience teaching English to children<\/li><li>Familiarity with play-based teaching techniques<\/li><li>Patient, creative, energetic, and strong in child communication<\/li><li>Able to use technology effectively in lessons<\/li><li>Proficient in using online teaching platforms<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Preferred Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Holds international teaching certifications such as CELTA, TEFL or TESOL<\/li><li>Experience in preschool or primary school settings<\/li><li>Advanced level of English proficiency<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Remember, at Flalingo, we believe in the motto \"Do Good.\" Join our team striving to do good for thousands of Flalingo students, and unleash your potential for kindness. We are leaders in our market and have excellent feedback and great CQC ratings. We also focus on making practice more perfect for our clinicians - from working to solve capacity challenges with smart triage technology, to minimising the administrative burden and providing exciting new career opportunities for all of our clinicians.<br><br>We are looking for a Physiotherapist to join our team, working remotely, full time or part time, with patients who are members of large medical insurance and cash plans, to deliver virtual and telephonic physiotherapy assessment and treatment for a diverse range of conditions. You will assess, diagnose and manage musculoskeletal problems, supporting patients with undifferentiated conditions within the scope of the role.<br><br><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong>You must have:<br><br><ul><li>Current and up to date registration with Health and Care Professions Council (HCPC)<\/li><li>A minimum of 2 years' experience, post qualification<\/li><li>IT literacy (intermediate level minimum)<\/li><li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills<\/li><li>Ability to work individually or within a team and foster good working relationships<\/li><li>Excellent time management and prioritisation skills<\/li><li>An awareness of and commitment to supporting and facilitating diversity and inclusion<\/li><li>Empathy, patience and excellent motivational skills<br><br><\/li><\/ul><em>We reserve the right to close this vacancy early if we receive sufficient applications. Online sellers connect their sales channels (Amazon, eBay, Shopify) and we orchestrate the rest: routing orders to a global network of warehouse and carrier partners, tracking every parcel to the customer's door, and giving sellers one clean view of their entire supply chain. We are a small, fast-moving, AI-native team that is almost doubling our business in 2026. Operations is the engine room, and this is where you learn how a real logistics platform runs: fast, with real ownership from day one.<br><br><strong>Your Mission<br><br><\/strong>Be the dependable engine of the ops team. You'll keep orders flowing - spotting and resolving the ones that get stuck or go missing - answer seller and operational queries, run our operational checks, and help build the AI skills and automations that take the repetitive work off everyone's plate. You'll learn the whole order journey end-to-end and, within months, start figuring things out on your own.<br><br><strong>Core Pillars<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Keep the flow clean: Run the daily cross-system checks; spot orders that are missing, stuck or mismatched, and resolve or escalate them<\/li><li>Support sellers &amp; partners: Answer operational tickets, run checkers, and create\/send invoices accurately and on time<\/li><li>Learn to build: Use Claude to build skills and automations that remove repetitive work, starting with the recruitment exercise and growing from there<\/li><li>Improve as you go: Drive incremental improvements to the tools and processes you touch every day<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You'll Achieve In Your First 90 Days<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Run the daily cross-system reconciliation reliably and clear order exceptions in your queue<\/li><li>Answer operational tickets within SLA and run the Bezos checkers independently<\/li><li>Build your first working Claude skill or small automation that saves the team time<\/li><li>Deliver clean, on-time work on a team project and start figuring out open-ended tasks with less hand-holding<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><strong>What we're looking for (non-negotiables)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Numerate &amp; analytical. A degree (or clearly demonstrated equivalent) in a quantitative discipline, eg engineering, maths, physics, CS, or a heavily numerate economics \/ finance \/ quant-social-science track. Comfortable with raw data and spreadsheets<\/li><li>AI-native: can build, not just chat. You use Claude\/AI in your daily work and can build a simple, working Claude skill. You don't need a portfolio of production agents yet, but you must demonstrate building one in the recruitment exercise. (Having already built skills\/agents is a strong plus.)<\/li><li>Reliable &amp; coachable. Delivers what's asked, on time, with clean work; asks questions when stuck rather than guessing; takes feedback well<\/li><li>Picks things up fast. Learns new tools and processes quickly and gets productive without a long ramp<\/li><li>Energised by startups. Excited by ambiguity, pace and ownership, wants a wide remit, not a narrow one<\/li><li>Clear communicator. Writes clearly, presents simple findings, and flags problems early<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Nice-to-haves<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Internships or part-time work in consulting, banking, operations, analytics, consulting, e-commerce or a startup<\/li><li>Light coding (Python \/ SQL) or no-code tooling (Make, Zapier, Retool, Airtable)<\/li><li>Having already built a Claude skill, agent or automation of your own<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Work in a genuinely AI-native team. Build with Claude, Retool and Make daily, with real budget and the freedom to automate your own job<\/li><li>The ability to shape your role in a fast-growing, exciting company at the forefront of the future of e-commerce<\/li><li>A workplace that's entrepreneurial, fast-paced, outcome-focused and disciplined, but also highly collaborative, team-oriented and fun<\/li><li>Significant opportunity for growth and personal development, and the chance to have a real impact<\/li><li>The team is fully remote, but meets in person a couple of times a month<\/li><li>25 holidays + 8 bank holidays<\/li><li>Mental health support through Spill, and a free Headspace subscription<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **CAPTIVATE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). You'll troubleshoot issues, guide customers through solutions, and ensure they receive timely, accurate, and friendly support across multiple channels.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys technology, problem-solving, and helping customers succeed.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>What You'll Do<\/strong><\/p><p>Customer Support<\/p><ul><li>Serve as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries via phone, email, and chat.<\/li><li>Troubleshoot software and technical issues while providing timely, effective solutions.<\/li><li>Educate customers on product features and best practices to help them maximize value.<\/li><li>Maintain accurate documentation of customer interactions and support cases within the CRM.<\/li><li>Escalate complex technical issues to the appropriate internal teams when needed.<\/li><li>Follow support cases through resolution while keeping customers informed throughout the process.<\/li><\/ul><p>Customer Success<\/p><ul><li>Gather customer feedback and identify opportunities to improve products and services.<\/li><li>Deliver an exceptional customer experience that drives satisfaction and retention.<\/li><li>Assist with additional customer support initiatives as needed.<\/li><li>Collaborate cross-functionally with internal teams to resolve issues efficiently.<\/li><\/ul><p>Performance &amp; Collaboration<\/p><ul><li>Meet established service metrics, including response times, case resolution, and customer satisfaction goals.<\/li><li>Participate in regular coaching, training, and performance development.<\/li><li>Contribute to a collaborative, team-oriented culture focused on continuous improvement.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Qualifications<\/strong><\/p><p>Required<\/p><ul><li>2\u00e2\u0080\u00934 years of customer support experience via phone, email, or chat.<\/li><li>Experience troubleshooting software or technical issues.<\/li><li>Experience using a CRM platform (Salesforce, Zendesk, or similar preferred).<\/li><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills.<\/li><li>Excellent problem-solving and customer service skills.<\/li><li>Comfortable learning new software and technologies.<\/li><\/ul><p>Preferred<\/p><ul><li>Experience supporting SaaS or software products.<\/li><li>Familiarity with remote support tools and ticketing systems.<\/li><li>Proficiency with Microsoft Office applications.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>What We're Looking For<\/strong><\/p><p>We're looking for someone who is:<\/p><ul><li>Customer-focused and patient<\/li><li>Strong technically with excellent troubleshooting skills<\/li><li>Organized and detail-oriented<\/li><li>Calm under pressure and solutions-driven<\/li><li>Collaborative and eager to learn<\/li><li>Comfortable working in a fast-paced remote environment<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Work Environment<\/strong><\/p><p>This is a <strong>fully remote position<\/strong> based in the United States. The role primarily involves computer and phone work in a professional home office environment. Occasional travel for team or company events may be available but is not required.<\/p><p>Compensation<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>The approved pay range for this role is <strong>$17.81\u00e2\u0080\u0093$30.85 per hour<\/strong>, depending on experience, qualifications, and geographic location.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Please note that the minimum of this pay range may be below the minimum wage requirements in certain locations. In those cases, compensation will comply with all applicable state and local wage laws. For example, the current minimum wage is <strong>$19.61\/hour in San Francisco, CA<\/strong> and <strong>$20.34\/hour in Emeryville, CA<\/strong>. Actual starting pay will always meet or exceed applicable local wage requirements and may vary based on work location, experience, and qualifications.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Benefits<\/strong><\/p><p>Eligible employees receive a comprehensive benefits package that includes medical, dental, vision, paid time off, retirement savings options, and additional programs designed to support employees' overall well-being.<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **INGENUITY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Working in a remote capacity, you will collaborate with a team of coordinators to facilitate the admissions process and deliver high-quality support to individuals seeking treatment.<br><br><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Previous experience in admissions, counseling, or a related field<\/li><li> Strong assessment skills and the ability to determine appropriate levels of care<\/li><li> Excellent teamwork and collaboration capabilities<\/li><li> Proficiency in remote communication tools and software<\/li><li> Self-motivated with the ability to work effectively in a remote environment<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Conduct assessments of potential clients to determine their treatment needs<\/li><li> Coordinate with other team members to ensure clients are placed in the most suitable level of care<\/li><li> Conduct remote consultations with individuals seeking treatment to explain available programs and requirements<\/li><li> Participate in team meetings<\/li><li> Maintain detailed electronic records of client assessments and admissions progress<\/li><li> Collaborate with other coordinators to streamline the remote admissions process and provide exceptional support to clients<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **DELIGHTFUL** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Our approach is to empower exceptional candidates to excel in a role by leveraging their strengths, regardless of whether they precisely match a job description. As a result, we welcome applicants with varying levels of experience, both exceeding and falling short of the requirements outlined below.<br><br>PixelPiew is a privately owned studio specializing in design, branding, and creative services. Our mission is to drive the evolution and prosperity of financial services, B2B, corporate, and non-profit organizations. We achieve this by harnessing the power of research and craftsmanship to create refined brand identities, websites, messaging, campaigns, and marketing materials.<br><br>We Want<br><br>We Are Actively Seeking Skilled And Enthusiastic Freelance Designers To Join Our Roster Of Creative Professionals. This Is a Broad Application, And We Invite All Designers To Apply, With a Special Emphasis On Those Who Excel In The Following Areas<br><br><ul><li> Logo and Brand Design<\/li><li> Motion Graphics Design<\/li><li> UX Design<\/li><li> Print Collateral Design<\/li><li> PowerPoint\/Google Slides Presentation Design<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Please be aware that while we may not be able to respond to every applicant immediately, we will retain all submissions for potential future opportunities. If you are passionate about design and are eager to tackle exciting and demanding projects, we sincerely encourage you to reach out to us!<br><br><strong>Compensation<br><br><\/strong>This is a freelance, remote position, but you are also welcome to work on-site at our Providence, RI location if you prefer. We offer competitive compensation that aligns with your level of expertise and experience.<br><br>How to Apply<br><br>To apply, please email careers@pixelpier.com, including your resume and portfolio. To test your attention to detail and show that you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ve read this entire listing, please also share your favorite typeface and explain why it resonates with you.<br><br>We are interested in hearing from individual applicants and kindly request that recruiters, agencies, and offshore firms refrain from applying.<br><br><ul><li> PixelPier is committed to equal employment opportunities and does not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment based on factors such as race, color, religion, national origin, age, gender, sex, ancestry, citizenship status, mental or physical disability, genetic information, sexual orientation, veteran status, or military status. Proud to deliver quality goods on time and put a smile on thousands of faces every week, earning an average of \u00c2\u00a330,100 per annum?<br><br><strong>Join Ocado Logistics where there are bags of possibilities.<br><br><\/strong>It\u00e2\u0080\u0099s our mission to provide an outstanding customer experience. Whilst others might call you delivery drivers, here at Ocado Logistics our Customer Service Team Members play a vital role, delivering top quality products on time and in an efficient manner.<br><br>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll be out on the road whatever the weather, but you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll never have to fight over the radio station, and you can sing along as loud as you like!<br><br>In return, we use our automated technology to pre plan your route and pre-load your van!<br><br>Everyone likes their groceries at different times, so our working patterns will involve evenings and weekends in addition to weekdays - so on top of your base pay you will receive premiums that will increase your average hourly earnings to \u00c2\u00a314.60 per hour. You can also stack your earnings further with enhanced overtime to fund those special occasions!<br><br>All your breaks are paid, meaning for every minute at work you get paid. That\u00e2\u0080\u0099s a great deal!<br><br>(Everyone\u00e2\u0080\u0099s shifts will vary but more information is included at the bottom of this advert to help you understand what that might look like.)<br><br>Whilst a Safe Working Environment Goes Without Saying, We Offer a Shopping List Of Perks That You Can Tailor To Suit Your Lifestyle, Including<br><br><ul><li>Company pension of up to 7% matched contributions after just 3 months <\/li><li>An enhanced digital health and wellbeing service, including virtual GP appointments, for you and your dependents <\/li><li>Hundreds of high street shopping, entertainment and restaurant discounts <\/li><li>Life insurance coverage from day one of employment <\/li><li>15% off your weekly shop with Ocado.com <\/li><li>Loads more voluntary benefits such as dental and travel insurance at a discounted price <\/li><li>Career progression \u00e2\u0080\u0093 if you suddenly decide that being a driver isn\u00e2\u0080\u0099t for you, there\u00e2\u0080\u0099s plenty of opportunity for progression, as 87% of our salaried roles are filled by internal colleagues! <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>So what do we need from you?<br><br><\/strong>You don\u00e2\u0080\u0099t need any previous experience to join our good-natured team, just bring yourself and a positive attitude, and our amazing training team will do the rest!<br><br><strong>But You Will Need The Following Driving Licence Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Full UK or EU driving licence. <\/li><li>Minimum of 12 months driving experience <\/li><li>Maximum of 6 penalty points. <\/li><li>No driving disqualifications in the past 5 years. <br><br><\/li><\/ul>Some deliveries involve the handling of alcohol products, so you must be over 18 to apply.<br><br>As this is a customer facing role, good communication skills are also essential.<br><br><strong>How To Apply<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Fill in an online application - there is no CV needed! <\/li><li>Our friendly recruitment team will get in touch to conduct an Online Licence Check and Right to Work Checks. <\/li><li>You will be invited to take a tour of the site, giving you the opportunity to meet the team for a question-and-answer session <\/li><li>We will run a Disclosure Barring System check (DBS). <\/li><li>Once all checks are completed, you will be offered the role and your career with Ocado Logistics will start! <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Contract Type: <\/strong>Permanent<br><br><strong>Contract Hours: <\/strong>40 hours (including paid breaks)<br><br><strong>Contracted days: <\/strong>You will be required to work any 5 days out of 7, working 8 hour shifts. You will be provided with further information during pre-boarding.<br><br><strong>Shifts: <\/strong>AM &amp; PM. You may start as early as 05:30 in the morning, and can finish as late as 12:00 (midnight). Please check your commute time prior to applying. You will receive your shift rota up to 13 weeks in advance.<br><br><strong>Pay Structure: <\/strong>The position is lunar paid. This means you will be paid every 4 weeks according to a monthly schedule. Please take this into consideration when applying.<br><br><strong>Hourly Pay Rates<br><br><\/strong>Monday to Saturday (Basic Rate)<br><br>\u00c2\u00a313.96<br><br>Evening Premium (from 6pm)<br><br>\u00c2\u00a315.08<br><br>Sunday Day Premium<br><br>\u00c2\u00a315.36<br><br>Sunday Evening Premium<br><br>\u00c2\u00a316.59<br><br>Overtime rate Monday to Saturday (Day Shift)<br><br>\u00c2\u00a317.45<br><br>Overtime rate Monday to Saturday (Evening Shift)<br><br>\u00c2\u00a318.57<br><br><em> We are proud to be a Disability Confident employer, prioritising inclusivity and equal opportunities for all individuals, ensuring a supportive and accessible workplace for people with disabilities. Our hotels empower guests to unlock peak mental and physical performance, no matter who they are, or what they\u00e2\u0080\u0099re striving to achieve. We realise exceptional, immersive lifestyle destinations where you can live without compromise.<br><br>Nestled between pristine blue Adriatic waters and mountains of conserved greenery, <strong>SIRO Boka Place<\/strong>, Montenegro offers coastal city charm and boundless opportunity. Unlock your potential and embark on a new adventure as part of a community passionate about fitness and wellbeing.<br><br><strong>About The Role<br><br><\/strong>The Laundry Attendant is an integral part of the commercial laundry operation, responsible for efficiently processing bulk laundry. This role includes operating specialized laundry equipment, assisting with washing, drying, and sorting tasks, and ensuring meticulous care in handling all garments. The Laundry Attendant also plays a key role in maintaining a clean and organized laundry area.<br><br><strong>Key Duties And Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Assist in the overall commercial laundry operations, ensuring efficient and timely processing of bulk laundry. <\/li><li> Operate specialized laundry equipment, including folding machines and calendaring ironers, with precision and care. <\/li><li> Fold, stock, label, and pack garments to maintain high-quality standards. <\/li><li> Maintain the cleanliness and organization of the laundry area, ensuring a tidy and efficient workspace. <\/li><li> Handle laundry trolleys and other items with care to prevent damage to linens and equipment. <\/li><li> Disinfect laundry trolleys and other items according to standard operating procedures to maintain hygiene standards. <\/li><li> Assist with washing, drying, and sorting laundry as needed and directed by the Team Leader, Laundry . <\/li><li> Collaborate with staff on processing uniforms, guest laundry, and other specific laundry needs. <\/li><li> Act as a runner for various tasks related to laundry operations, ensuring smooth workflow and addressing immediate operational needs. <\/li><li> Monitor and report any issues with laundry equipment or operations to the supervisor for prompt resolution. <\/li><li> Follow all safety protocols and operational guidelines to ensure a safe working environment. <\/li><li> Maintain accurate records of laundry items processed and ensure proper documentation. <\/li><li> Assist in inventory management by monitoring and replenishing laundry supplies as needed. <\/li><li> Ensure compliance with all company policies and procedures related to commercial laundry operations. <\/li><li> Regularly inspect laundry equipment for proper functioning and report any maintenance needs to the supervisor. <\/li><li> Participate in training programs to stay updated on best practices and safety standards in laundry operations. <\/li><li> Provide assistance and support to the washer, dryer, and sorter when required and directed by the Team Leader, Laundry. <\/li><li> Ensure the efficient flow of laundry processes from intake to final delivery, maintaining high standards of quality and efficiency. Always present yourself professionally and address guests in a polite and respectful manner. <\/li><li> Ensure proper and effective use of all supplies and equipment provided to you. <\/li><li> Follow hotel's Lost and Found procedures diligently, documenting and securely storing all found items, and reporting them to management. <\/li><li> Report any service-related defects immediately to the team leader. <\/li><li> Assist in training new colleagues in job skills as requested by Team Leader, Laundry. <\/li><li> Act as a best runner to support the colleagues in the valet laundry team. <\/li><li> Report incidents and guest complaints promptly to the Team Leader Laundry, Assistant Manager Laundry. <\/li><li> Ensure that daily tasks are executed to the highest standards of valet laundry service. <\/li><li> Attend and actively participate in team events, required training sessions, and job-related briefings <\/li><li> Effectively communicate and maintain positive working relationships with colleagues at all levels. <\/li><li> Be motivated to transfer knowledge and promote a continuously positive work environment. <\/li><li> Maintain a consistently professional attitude towards guests and colleagues alike. <\/li><li> Demonstrate flexibility in work timing and schedule to accommodate operational demands effectively; willing to work extra hours to cover the workload as directed by the superiors <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>E Ducation, Skills &amp; Experience<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> High school diploma or equivalent; additional education in hospitality or related field is a plus. <\/li><li> Fluent in the local language, spoken &amp; written English, any other foreign language is a plus factor <\/li><li> Must be skilled to perform the job of a Attendant, Laundry. <\/li><li> A minimum of 2 years of job experience in a five-star hotel or commercial laundry setting. <br><br><\/li><\/ul>Our brand is expanding faster than ever before. We are investing in the growth of our company, and that means we are committed to investing in you. Join a team that is open-hearted, intuitive, generous, and spontaneous in spirit. We believe in making our guests happy beyond anything they have ever imagined. We wow them at every turn and create memories that will last a lifetime. Since 2024, the Company has centered its strategy on an Independent Power Producer (IPP) model, developing, building, owning, and&nbsp;operating&nbsp;critical energy assets around the world.&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">Energy Vault&nbsp;operates&nbsp;globally, with headquarters in Westlake Village, California and Lugano, Switzerland, and regional development across North America, Europe, Asia, and Australia. The Company partners with utilities, grid operators, and large energy consumers to deliver infrastructure that strengthens grid reliability, enables renewable integration, and supports long-term energy security.&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">By combining asset ownership with advanced technologies and integration&nbsp;expertise, Energy Vault is building the next generation of critical energy infrastructure, delivering dependable power when and where it matters most.&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">Learn more at&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/www.energyvault.com\/\">www.energyvault.com<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">, explore recent updates in&nbsp;our&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/www.energyvault.com\/newsroom\">Newsroom,<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">&nbsp;and connect&nbsp;with us on&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/www.linkedin.com\/company\/energy-vault-inc\">LinkedIn<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">,&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/twitter.com\/EnergyVaultInc\">X<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">,&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/www.facebook.com\/EnergyVaultInc\">Facebook<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">,&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/www.instagram.com\/energyvaultinc\/\">Instagram<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">,&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/vimeo.com\/user91513072\">Vimeo<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">, or&nbsp;<\/span><a style=\"font-size: 16px;\" href=\"https:\/\/www.youtube.com\/c\/EnergyVaultInc\">YouTube<\/a><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">.&nbsp;<\/span><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">&nbsp;<\/span><\/b><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">Our Values&nbsp;<\/span><\/b><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">We Commit:<\/span><\/b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\"> To Building a Better Future for Earth and All Its Beings.<\/span><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">We Innovate:<\/span><\/b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\"> Cutting Edge Solutions to Accelerate the Unique Energy Aspirations of Our Clients.<\/span><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">We Connect:&nbsp;<\/span><\/b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">To Build Genuine Relationships.<\/span><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">We Deliver:&nbsp;<\/span><\/b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">Going Above &amp; Beyond by Being Fast &amp; Nimble.<\/span><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">We Lead:&nbsp;<\/span><\/b><span style=\"font-size: 16px;\">With Authenticity and Purpose.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Your Impact as a Senior Counsel - Project Finance &amp; Commercial:<\/strong><\/p>\n<p>We are seeking a Senior Counsel with substantial project finance experience to lead the financing of our renewable energy, battery storage, and data center infrastructure projects. This is a fast-paced, high-volume role requiring someone who can manage multiple live transactions simultaneously, operate with a high degree of independence, and engage commercially with lenders, investors, and internal business teams. The right candidate is not just a strong lawyer \u00e2\u0080\u0094 they are a pragmatic problem-solver who moves quickly, communicates clearly, and keeps all deals on track.<\/p>\\n<p><\/p><p><br><\/p><b>Your Mission:<\/b><div>\n<p><strong>Project Finance:<\/strong><\/p>\n<ul>\n<li>Lead end-to-end legal structuring and negotiation of project finance transactions, including construction loans, term debt, tax equity, back-leverage facilities, and permanent financing for battery storage, renewable energy, and data center projects.<\/li>\n<li>Draft and negotiate credit agreements, security packages, depositary and accounts agreements, consent and assignment agreements, and all related financing documents with lenders, tax equity investors, and institutional counterparties.<\/li>\n<li>Advise on financing structures for build-own-operate (BOO) assets, including collateral structures, security interests, and intercreditor arrangements.<\/li>\n<li>Manage lender due diligence processes and coordinate with lenders' counsel through financial close.<\/li>\n<li>Advise on IRA tax credit structures, including investment tax credits (ITC) and production tax credits (PTC), domestic content requirements, energy communities, and Foreign Entity of Concern (FEOC) compliance as it relates to financing eligibility and tax credit qualification.<\/li>\n<li>Support refinancings, amendments, waivers, and ongoing lender compliance matters post-close.<\/li>\n<li>Simultaneously manage multiple transactions at varying stages of execution without loss of quality or attention to detail.<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n<p><strong>Corporate Finance:<\/strong><\/p>\n<ul>\n<li>Support corporate-level debt facilities, revolving credit lines, and other balance sheet financing activities.<\/li>\n<li>Advise on entity structuring and capitalization for project-level subsidiaries and holding company arrangements.<\/li>\n<li>Assist with corporate governance matters tied to financing transactions.<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n<p><strong>Commercial Support:<\/strong><\/p>\n<ul>\n<li>Familiarity with EPC contracts, equipment procurement agreements, PPAs, and interconnection agreements is a plus, primarily in the context of bankability review and lender consent processes.<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n<\/div><p><br><\/p><b>Your Background:<\/b><div>\n<ul>\n<li>J.D. from an accredited law school.<\/li>\n<li>Member of a state bar in good standing.<\/li>\n<li>8\u00e2\u0080\u009315 years of project finance experience, with significant exposure to energy, battery storage, infrastructure, or data center financings.<\/li>\n<li>Demonstrated track record closing complex project finance transactions from term sheet through financial close, including tax equity structures (ITC and\/or PTC).<\/li>\n<li>Working knowledge of IRA incentive structures, domestic content and FEOC compliance requirements, and how they interact with project financing and tax credit eligibility.<\/li>\n<li>Experience with construction financing and term conversion is highly valued.<\/li>\n<li>Corporate finance or capital markets experience is a plus.<\/li>\n<li>Proven ability to manage a high-volume workload \u00e2\u0080\u0094 multiple active deals, competing priorities, and tight deadlines \u00e2\u0080\u0094 with composure and sound commercial judgment.<\/li>\n<li>Commercially minded with strong instincts for practical risk allocation; able to distinguish issues worth fighting for from those that are not.<\/li>\n<li>Excellent drafting and negotiation skills; confident advising and presenting to senior leadership and external counterparties.<\/li>\n<li>Willingness to travel domestically and\/or internationally, up to 10%.<\/li>\n<li>Comfortable thriving in fast-paced, rapid growth environments.<\/li>\n<li>A passion for sustainability, our mission, and our vision is a bonus!<\/li>\n<li style=\"list-style-type: revert;\">Must successfully pass a pre-employment background check.<\/li>\n<li style=\"list-style-type: revert;\">Energy Vault participates in E-Verify.<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n<\/div><p><br><\/p><b>Benefits of Powering the Future with Energy Vault:<\/b><div>\n<ul>\n<li>Annual bonus plan.<\/li>\n<li>Restricted Stock Units (RSUs).<\/li>\n<li>401K employer matching.<\/li>\n<li>Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision plans for employees and family.<\/li>\n<li>Flexible Spending Account.<\/li>\n<li>Company-paid Life insurance, Short- and Long-term disability insurance.<\/li>\n<li>8-weeks for Paternity leave.<\/li>\n<li>Generous holiday allowance.<\/li>\n<li>Flexible time off plus sick leave.<\/li>\n<li>Reimbursement for home office equipment, phone, and internet expenses.<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n<\/div><p><br><\/p><p><\/p>\\n<div>$146,000 - $234,000 a year<\/div><small><div data-qa=\"salary-range\">\n<div data-qa=\"salary-range\">\n<div><span data-contrast=\"auto\">The range, $146<\/span><span data-contrast=\"auto\">,000<\/span><span data-contrast=\"auto\"> to $234<\/span><span data-contrast=\"auto\">,000<\/span><span We create high-end residential interiors and are looking for a talented full-time Video Editor to help grow both our company brand and our founder\u00e2\u0080\u0099s personal brand through engaging short-form content.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Edit Instagram Reels, TikTok videos, and other short-form content.<\/li><li> Create engaging edits with strong hooks, smooth pacing, captions, transitions, and sound effects.<\/li><li> Organize and manage raw footage efficiently.<\/li><li> Deliver high-quality videos within agreed deadlines.<\/li><li> Maintain a clean, premium editing style that aligns with our luxury brand.<\/li><li> Learn our editing style and progressively edit content with minimal guidance.<\/li><li> Stay up to date with social media trends and apply them where relevant.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Proven experience editing short-form social media content.<\/li><li> Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.<\/li><li> Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, and audience retention.<\/li><li> Excellent attention to detail.<\/li><li> Reliable internet connection and availability to work full-time.<\/li><li> Good communication skills and willingness to learn and grow with the company.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>What We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re Looking For<br><br>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for someone creative, proactive, and passionate about creating content that performs. During the first few weeks, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll work closely together to teach you our editing style. Our goal is for you to become confident enough to edit independently while maintaining our brand identity.<br><br>Application Process<br><br><strong>Please Submit<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Your CV<\/li><li> Portfolio or examples of your best editing work<\/li><li> Three short-form videos you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re most proud of<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete an editing test before the final interview.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **STIMULATE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). When you join Ipsum, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re not just taking a job \u00e2\u0080\u0094 you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re starting a career with real support behind it.??<br><br>24 days annual leave plus bank holidays<br><br>Option to buy up to 5 additional holidays<br><br>Group Personal Pension Plan<br><br>Career development &amp; progression with the opportunity to earn professional qualifications<br><br>24\/7 access to a virtual GP??and Mental health support &amp; counselling services??<br><br>Cycle to Work scheme??<br><br>Discount club - supermarkets, phone bills, gyms &amp; more?!?<br><br>Life assurance cover??<br><br>Long service recognition??<br><br>Enhanced Maternity Pay<br><br>Paid volunteering opportunities in your community??<br><br><strong>About The Role\u00e2\u0080\u00a6<br><br><\/strong>We have a fantastic opportunity to join our team in Oxfordshire as Cable Jointer 11kV to 33kV you will be responsible for the quality and compliance to standard of workmanship and others working on the project ensuring compliance with authorisation procedures.<br><br>As a Cable Jointer you will be...<br><br>To act in the capacity of Cable Jointer in compliance with, Authorisation Procedures and the Electricity Supply Industry. Responsible for Electrical Safety Management for any project which they have made safe for others to work upon, ensuring wherever possible compliance to Asset Owner standards.<br><br>To operate within the Private and Public Project Network Businesses building strong working relationships with your peers and customers. Driving positive change across the busines and responsible for the Quality and Compliance to Standard of their Workmanship and others working on the project<br><br>Cable Jointing and associated works ensuring programmed works are at the highest Safety Standards. Responsible for site safety and work quality and compliance with Health, Safety, Environmental and Quality standards.<br><br>Ensure customer satisfaction through excellent Project delivery compliance with Ipsum processes and driving of continuous improvement. Manage programmed works to the highest Electrical Safety Management Safety Standards and Environmental Standards<br><br>Deliver the programmed works at the expected level of quality, performance, safety and cost and ensure resolution of Site issues to full project completion, with site management interface between Customer\u00e2\u0080\u0099s, Staff and other Service Providers<br><br><strong>About You\u00e2\u0080\u00a6<br><br><\/strong>Technical status and a qualified Electrical Engineer with a LV\/HV Jointer Qualification or equivalent.<br><br>Detailed understanding of current HV &amp; LV electrical Jointing techniques from 11kV to 33kV<br><br>Solid and up to date knowledge of statutory requirements, legislation and technical advances.<br><br>Good knowledge of Health and Safety practice and Risk Assessment processes. xlqdzyr<br><br>Experience working in a fast-paced customer facing environment<br><br>You will require a CTC Clearance for this position along with a UK Driving Licence<br><br>Our commitment to Equal Opportunities...<br><br>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re proud to be an equal opportunities employer. We welcome applications from all backgrounds and experiences, and we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re committed to building a diverse and inclusive workforce.? Before applying, please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we process your data in line with GDPR.?<br><br>Next steps...<br><br>If you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re interested in this opportunity, please apply or reach out to the Talent Team for more info<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **DAWN** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Any company or individual claiming to recruit on behalf of Foxelli Group is not affiliated with us.<br><br><\/strong>At Foxelli, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re building more than e-commerce brands - we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re building a tribe of thoughtful humans: AI enthusiasts, curious builders, and ambitious minds who care about doing meaningful work together. Ten years in, our D2C brands reach millions and generate over $20M annually. Our focus stays simple: create products customers love and a team that actually enjoys building them.<br><br>If you love to learn, experiment, think boldly, make decisions, and build things that matter - you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll feel at home with us.<br><br><strong>WHY JOIN FOXELLI?<br><br><\/strong>Foxelli is a place for people who think deeply, learn quickly, automate repetitive work, enjoy spending time together, and build things that matter. We work hard, joke often, and don\u00e2\u0080\u0099t take ourselves too seriously.<br><br>If you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re excited about AI, eager to learn, and want to create work that genuinely means something with people who care, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll feel right at home with us - no matter where you are in your career.<br><br><strong>THE ROLE<br><br><\/strong>You will be creating short-form vertical video series for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. The content includes dark romance, horror, thriller, and fantasy micro-dramas - serialized stories published daily, each episode 60-90 seconds long.<br><br>This is not a traditional production role. You'll move fast, iterate constantly, and use cutting-edge AI video tools. Quality and speed both matter here.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Generate scenes using the latest AI video tools<\/li><li>Edit footage into finished episodes in vertical 9:16 format<\/li><li>Maintain character consistency across episodes using approved reference assets<\/li><li>Sync music and sound effects to match the tone and pacing of each scene<\/li><li>Add captions and text overlays timed to dialogue and action<\/li><li>Export and optimize content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What We're Looking For<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience working with AI tools for generating video, static, and audio<\/li><li>Understanding of the basic rules of editing and frame composition<\/li><li>Prompt engineering skills<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>It will be a plus:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience in classic video production (films, TV series, shows)<\/li><li>Understanding of dramaturgy and story construction<\/li><li>The full cycle of AI video creation - from idea to final<\/li><li>Experience working with short drama or creating AI content for TikTok \/ YouTube<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>THE RECRUITMENT PROCESS<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Apply - A simple form that helps us know who\u00e2\u0080\u0099s stepping into our world. <\/li><li>Text Task - A small real-world challenge so we can see how you approach problems in action. <\/li><li> Hire - if you both align, we'll invite you to join our team on a test trial period. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>FIXED SERVICE FEE <br><br><\/strong><strong>Up to 2000<\/strong> euros per month after taxes (depending on your skills, competencies, and experience).<br><br><strong>Perks &amp; Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Full flexibility with your schedule in a fully remote setting, while Hubstaff ensures transparency and fairness. <\/li><li>Complimentary gym memberships and company-sponsored outdoor adventures for your strength and to keep your physical well-being in check. <\/li><li>A personal development budget is at your disposal for your personal and professional growth to ensure you keep growing continuously. <\/li><li>Generous paid time off, including parental leave and vacation days, to recharge and rejuvenate and ensure you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re well-rested. <\/li><li>A budget for your home office setup so you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re comfortable working how you like and where you like. <\/li><li>Strong company culture and a network of unique individuals that celebrate you. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>ELIGIBILITY &amp; LOCATION REQUIREMENTS<br><br><\/strong>\u00e2\u009d\u0095This role is 100% remote.<br><br><ul><li>Our tribe works primarily in the Eastern European Time Zone (EET \u00e2\u0080\u0094 UTC+2\/UTC+3).
