Buscamos pessoas que querem contribuir com impacto real e crescer junto com a gente!<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 15px\">Nosso ritmo \u00c3\u00a9 intenso, assim como o aprendizado com gente muito talentosa e equipes colaborativas que geram impacto real desde o primeiro dia, com o b\u00c3\u00b4nus de trabalhar de qualquer lugar do <a href=\"http:\/\/Brasil.Aqui\">Brasil.<\/a><\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 15px\">Aqui a inova\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e tecnologia andam juntos e diversidade \u00c3\u00a9 decis\u00c3\u00a3o estrat\u00c3\u00a9gica do neg\u00c3\u00b3cio e compromisso que molda nossas decis\u00c3\u00b5es e garante um ambiente acolhedor para todas as pessoas.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 15px\"> Valorizamos a colabora\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, o di\u00c3\u00a1logo aberto e entregas que compreendam as necessidades das pessoas que usam nossas solu\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5<a href=\"http:\/\/es.Se\">es.Se<\/a> voc\u00c3\u00aa \u00c3\u00a9 uma pessoa que gosta de construir, testar, aprender e se comprometer com a excel\u00c3\u00aancia, a Neon \u00c3\u00a9 pra voc\u00c3\u00aa.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><span style=\"font-size: 15px\">Vem fazer parte de um time que n\u00c3\u00a3o tem medo de sonhar grande e trabalha junto para elevar a barra todos os dias, fazendo o dinheiro fluir e o mundo crescer. <b>Vem #ViverNoAzul!<\/b><\/span><\/p>\\n<p><\/p><p><br><\/p><b>O que estamos buscando<\/b><div>Buscamos um profissional em n\u00c3\u00advel de <strong>Expert<\/strong> (com senioridade equivalente a Gerente, sem gest\u00c3\u00a3o direta de pessoas) para liderar as alavancas de engajamento de clientes sem cr\u00c3\u00a9dito na Neon. Nessa posi\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, voc\u00c3\u00aa ser\u00c3\u00a1 a principal refer\u00c3\u00aancia anal\u00c3\u00adtica e estrat\u00c3\u00a9gica do time, atuando com lideran\u00c3\u00a7a por influ\u00c3\u00aancia para conectar insights de dados ao impacto direto na margem de contribui\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e na efici\u00c3\u00aancia operacional do neg\u00c3\u00b3cio.<\/div><p><br><\/p><b>Responsabilidades<\/b><ul>\n<li>Desenhar e liderar a estrat\u00c3\u00a9gia macro de envio e entrega de cart\u00c3\u00b5es, mapeando e mitigando gargalos cr\u00c3\u00adticos na cadeia para garantir efici\u00c3\u00aancia de custos (<em>savings<\/em>) e a maximiza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o da taxa de ativa\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, al\u00c3\u00a9m de identificar as principais alavancas para o engajamento do cliente, para al\u00c3\u00a9m do cr\u00c3\u00a9dito, e como influenci\u00c3\u00a1-las.<\/li>\n<li>Atuar de forma aut\u00c3\u00b4noma na modelagem e extra\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de grandes volumes de dados complexos via SQL, transformando dados brutos em direcionamentos estrat\u00c3\u00a9gicos que guiem o roadmap de crescimento do produto.<\/li>\n<li>Desenvolver, validar e defender estudos de viabilidade financeira complexos perante a lideran\u00c3\u00a7a, conectando as iniciativas de produto diretamente a indicadores de sa\u00c3\u00bade do neg\u00c3\u00b3cio como LTV, CAC e controle de <em>churn<\/em>.<\/li>\n<li>&nbsp;Implantar, estruturar e disseminar o framework de testes de ponta a ponta, elevando o n\u00c3\u00advel t\u00c3\u00a9cnico das das nossas an\u00c3\u00a1lises e garantindo solidez nas conclus\u00c3\u00b5es e recomenda\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es.<\/li>\n<li>&nbsp;Desenhar e garantir a governan\u00c3\u00a7a de pain\u00c3\u00a9is de performance (KPIs) voltados para a alta lideran\u00c3\u00a7a, traduzindo m\u00c3\u00a9tricas e an\u00c3\u00a1lises t\u00c3\u00a9cnicas em narrativas de neg\u00c3\u00b3cios claras e acion\u00c3\u00a1veis.<\/li>\n<li>Arquitetar solu\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es de automa\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o para os processos de coleta e tratamento de dados, garantindo que as an\u00c3\u00a1lises recorrentes operem com o m\u00c3\u00a1ximo de agilidade, precis\u00c3\u00a3o e autonomia.<\/li>\n<li>Atuar como o principal elo estrat\u00c3\u00a9gico entre as tribos de produto, opera\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es e a lideran\u00c3\u00a7a s\u00c3\u00aanior (C-level), comunicando estrat\u00c3\u00a9gias complexas de forma persuasiva, alinhando expectativas e destravando barreiras.<\/li>\n<\/ul><p><br><\/p><b>Requisitos<\/b><ul>\n<li>Capacidade Anal\u00c3\u00adtica e Resolu\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de Problemas demonstrada na habilidade para estruturar problemas complexos, mensurar impactos com clareza e desdobr\u00c3\u00a1-los em planos de a\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o priorizados.<\/li>\n<li>Dom\u00c3\u00adnio Avan\u00c3\u00a7ado de SQL com experi\u00c3\u00aancia consolidada em extra\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, manipula\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e modelagem de dados complexos para suporte \u00c3\u00a0 tomada de decis\u00c3\u00a3o<\/li>\n<li>Vis\u00c3\u00a3o de Neg\u00c3\u00b3cio e Unit Economics trazendo forte entendimento de P&amp;L (Lucros e Perdas) e das principais alavancas de resultado financeiro, conectando m\u00c3\u00a9tricas de produto \u00c3\u00a0 sustentabilidade do neg\u00c3\u00b3cio.<\/li>\n<li>Cultura de Experimenta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e Estat\u00c3\u00adstica focada em viv\u00c3\u00aancia pr\u00c3\u00a1tica no desenho, execu\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e an\u00c3\u00a1lise estat\u00c3\u00adstica de Testes A\/B e outras metodologias de experimenta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o<\/li>\n<li>Lideran\u00c3\u00a7a por Influ\u00c3\u00aancia com perfil aut\u00c3\u00b4nomo, proativo e resiliente, al\u00c3\u00a9m de habilidade para engajar e alinhar times multidisciplinares sem depend\u00c3\u00aancia de autoridade formal<\/li>\n<li>Pensamento Estrat\u00c3\u00a9gico focado em vis\u00c3\u00a3o de longo prazo aliada \u00c3\u00a0 capacidade de execu\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o no curto prazo, garantindo consist\u00c3\u00aancia nas entregas<\/li>\n<\/ul><p><br><\/p><b>Diferenciais<\/b><div>\n<ul>\n<li data-path-to-node=\"3,0,0\">Background no Mercado Financeiro com viv\u00c3\u00aancia consolidada em fintechs, bancos ou consultorias estrat\u00c3\u00a9gicas<\/li>\n<li data-path-to-node=\"3,1,0\">Background em Modelagem trazendo conhecimentos pr\u00c3\u00a1ticos em linguagens como Python ou R para o desenvolvimento de an\u00c3\u00a1lises preditivas e manipula\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es estat\u00c3\u00adsticas avan\u00c3\u00a7adas<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n<\/div><p><br><\/p><p><\/p>\\n<p><span style=\"font-size: 18px\"><b>Se vier fazer parte da Neon<\/b><\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><b><span style=\"font-size: standard.<\/p><p><strong> <\/strong><\/p><p><strong>DO YOU HAVE:<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>A minimum 3 years\u00e2\u0080\u0099 hands-on experience in property maintenance, facilities, or handyman fault diagnosis<\/p><p>Proven plumbing maintenance skills, including responding to urgent repair situations<\/p><p>Experience maintaining equipment, tools, gates, and mechanical systems<\/p><p>The ability to perform physically demanding tasks in outdoor environments and near water<\/p><p>Experience working on boats or in marine environments, strongly preferred<\/p><p>Strong problem-solving skills with a proactive, maintenance-first mindset<\/p><p>Flexibility to work evenings, weekends, public holidays, and participate in on-call rotation<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>WE WANT YOU TO:<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Perform routine and preventative maintenance across all properties, including AC systems, plumbing, electrical, and mechanical repairs<\/p><p>Troubleshoot and resolve maintenance issues quickly to minimize downtime and ensure safety<\/p><p>Maintain and service gates, pumps, tools, and equipment to ensure reliability and longevity<\/p><p>Power wash and upkeep exterior areas, ensuring properties remain clean and well-presented<\/p><p>Support emergency maintenance needs, including after-hours repairs and urgent callouts<\/p><p>Assist with hurricane preparedness, securing property assets and implementing safety measures<\/p><p>Maintain maintenance records, inventory of tools and parts, and coordinate supply needs<\/p><p>Provide operational support where needed while prioritizing maintenance excellence<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>At Dart, we're committed to creating a workplace where you thrive, offering a competitive salary and benefits designed for your well-being and growth. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Mangaluru, ","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-iot-specialist-jasper-solutions-inc-1134196","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-iot-specialist-jasper-solutions-inc-1134196"},{"slug":"remote-people-operations-specialist-vulncheck-1134172","id":"1134172","epoch":1782503858,"date":"2026-06-26T19:57:38+00:00","company":"VulnCheck","company_logo":"","position":"People Operations Specialist","tags":["hr","infosec","coordinator","customer support","marketing","exec","ops","medical","recruiter","full time"],"description":"<p><strong>People Operations Specialist<\/strong><\/p><p><strong>Location: <\/strong>(Greater) Boston, MA<br><strong>Team: <\/strong>People<br><strong>Employment Type:<\/strong> Full-Time<\/p><strong>About VulnCheck<\/strong><p>VulnCheck is transforming vulnerability intelligence by helping security teams act faster and with more confidence. Our platform delivers early, high-quality exploit intelligence, deep asset correlation, and contextual insights to help organizations stay ahead of emerging threats.<\/p><strong>About the Role<\/strong><p>VulnCheck is scaling fast globally, and we're excited to be growing our People function to match. This is a newly created role designed to bring operational rigor to the systems and processes that power our team globally. We're looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is energized by driving a top-notch employee experience. You'll lead the global HRIS implementation in partnership with the Director of Talent, help build out compliance and benefits infrastructure across multiple jurisdictions, and be the connective tissue between People strategy and day-to-day execution.<\/p><p>This role sits on a lean People team and reports directly to the Director of Talent. You'll have real ownership from day one, and your work will be visible across the entire organization. This is a 100% remote role with preference for candidates located in Greater Boston, MA<\/p><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Do<\/strong><ul><li><strong><strong>Onboarding &amp; Offboarding:<\/strong><\/strong> Build and own the full employee lifecycle experience \u00e2\u0080\u0094 from onboarding playbook and I-9 compliance to exit interviews and jurisdiction-specific offboarding requirements.<\/li><li><strong><strong>Benefits &amp; Compliance:<\/strong><\/strong> Stand up benefits administration across US, UK, and Singapore; build a multi-jurisdiction compliance calendar; support EOR-to-direct employment transitions.<\/li><li><strong><strong>Performance Cycles:<\/strong><\/strong> Build and administer review scheduling, calibration logistics, and template infrastructure; ensure performance data flows into HRIS to inform comp planning.<\/li><li><strong><strong>People Insights:<\/strong><\/strong> Establish reporting on new hire feedback, exit themes, and attrition data to surface actionable insights for leadership.<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Bring<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>3+ years in People Operations, HR, Recruiting Operations, Benefits Coordinator or a closely related role, ideally within a startup or fast-growing environment<\/li><li>Hands-on experience with modern people tools<\/li><li>Self-starter mentality that loves finding solutions to problems before they surface, and ability to prioritize various projects<\/li><li>Demonstrated experience managing HR compliance across multiple jurisdictions or countries<\/li><li>Strong process orientation \u00e2\u0080\u0094 you build systems, document them, and maintain them over time<\/li><li>High attention to detail and data accuracy, and ability to handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism<\/li><li>Roll up your sleeves attitude with drive to close gaps when and where needed<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Experience supporting remote and globally distributed teams building scalable programs that promote connection, engagement, and exceptional employee experience<\/li><li>AI savvy or interest to learn and utilize AI to automate, optimize and shape the future of People Operations<\/li><\/ul><strong>What We Offer<\/strong><p>We believe people do their best work when they feel supported, trusted, and valued. VulnCheck offers benefits designed to meet a wide range of needs and lifestyles:<\/p><strong>Benefits and Perks<\/strong><ul><li>Unlimited PTO<\/li><li>401k plan with company match<\/li><li>Comprehensive healthcare coverage<\/li><li>Generous paid parental leave<\/li><li>Remote friendly environment with flexibility<\/li><li>Expense reimbursement for Cell Phone &amp; Internet\u00c2\u00a0<\/li><li>Ongoing professional development, coaching, and learning resources<\/li><li>Opportunities for career advancement within a fast-growing team<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Compensation\u00c2\u00a0<\/strong><\/p><p>We offer competitive compensation packages commensurate with experience, including salary, equity, and where applicable, performance-based pay. Our Talent Team can answer questions around VulnCheck\u00e2\u0080\u0099s total rewards during your interview process.<\/p><strong>Why Join Us<\/strong><p>Built on over two decades of cybersecurity experience, our team of experts understands the intricacies of vulnerabilities, their exploitation in the wild, and how to leverage this data to build more effective cybersecurity products that produce better outcomes for organizations.<\/p><p>VulnCheck gives organizations a tactical advantage by providing best-in-class exploit &amp; vulnerability intelligence information. We have a sense of duty to protect the critical infrastructure we rely on including medical devices, power grids and telecommunication networks. We were founded in 2021 in Lexington, Massachusetts.<\/p><p>VulnCheck has a transparent, collaborative, and supportive culture - we are looking for people who have a growth mindset, are curious and innovative. Our team is smart, but humble, hardworking, and supportive.<\/p><p>VulnCheck is proud to be an Equal Employer Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. VulnCheck is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. *Even if your experience doesn\u00e2\u0080\u0099t perfectly align with the job description, we encourage you to apply\u00e2\u0080\u0094we value potential just as much as a perfect resume.<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **TALENTS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Boston, Boston, Massachusetts, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-people-operations-specialist-vulncheck-1134172","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-people-operations-specialist-vulncheck-1134172"},{"slug":"remote-manager-social-art-director-starface-world-1134222","id":"1134222","epoch":1782503068,"date":"2026-06-26T19:44:28+00:00","company":"Starface World","company_logo":"","position":"Manager Social Art Director","tags":["art direction","exec","coordinator","customer support","marketing","content writing","medical"],"description":"<p><strong>your impact @ starface<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Starface is seeking a <strong>Manager, Social Art Director<\/strong> to help evolve and elevate our social creative across owned, paid, and retail channels. In this role, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll report directly to our Director, Social &amp; Content. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll lead the ideation and execution of highly creative, brand-right social content, manage and support a Social Media Coordinator, and help push Starface\u00e2\u0080\u0099s social presence forward across existing and emerging platforms.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>While this role is <strong>fully remote<\/strong>, we are ideally <strong>looking for someone based in New York City or Los Angeles <\/strong>who can be available for occasional on-site shoots and in-person creative moments.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>The right person for this role is a social-first creative thinker, a strong people manager, an expert collaborator, and someone who is deeply online \u00e2\u0080\u0093 but not overly reliant on trends or algorithms.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>At Starface, we find fun, lead with care, aim high, stay curious, and move forward. We love people who defy convention and welcome an attitude of exploration into the bold and creative in all that we do. If you are a highly creative social art director who knows how to make content that feels fresh, thoughtful, platform-native, and unmistakably Starface, and all of this resonates with you so far, please keep reading!<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>we\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll count on you to<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><ul><li>Ideate and manage the execution of social content across owned organic, paid, and retail channels, delivering creative that is both highly original and strategically aligned.<\/li><li>Support growth, engagement, awareness, and brand love across Starface\u00e2\u0080\u0099s social channels by creating content that reaches new audiences, builds loyalty, and drives positive sentiment.<\/li><li>Evolve Starface\u00e2\u0080\u0099s creative approach across existing platforms and emerging channels, helping us stay best-in-class as the brand scales.<\/li><li>Maintain Starface\u00e2\u0080\u0099s brand integrity while continuing to push the creative boundaries of what our social content can be.<\/li><li>Manage, mentor, and support one direct report, helping them grow creatively while ensuring strong execution and follow-through.<\/li><li>Lead creative brainstorming, oversee content execution, identify opportunities for improvement, and give thoughtful feedback across social creative work.<\/li><li>Source, brief, contract, and manage creators from start to finish, including both traditional influencers and more unexpected creative collaborators such as artists, ceramicists, makers, and other culturally relevant creators.<\/li><li>Collaborate closely with cross-functional partners across marketing, retail, creative, copy, external agencies, and other key stakeholders.<\/li><li>Translate marketing, launch, brand, and retail briefs into social-first creative ideas that are timely, on-brand, and executable.<\/li><li>Build strong working relationships with internal and external partners, ensuring all asks and briefs are delivered on time.<\/li><li>Bring a clear point of view to the work, proactively sharing ideas, opportunities, and areas for improvement.<\/li><li>Understand how creative needs to flex across platforms, including Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, paid social, organic channels, and new\/emerging spaces.<\/li><li>Balance quantity and quality of output, increasing the volume of strong social creative without sacrificing craft, taste, or brand consistency.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>this role is for you if<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><ul><li>You have 5+ years of experience in social, ideally with a creative or art direction background rather than a purely marketing-led social background.<\/li><li>You have experience managing at least one direct report and know how to support, guide, and grow creative talent.<\/li><li>You are deeply online and genuinely understand what is happening culturally, especially with Gen Z and Gen Alpha.<\/li><li>You know how to think beyond trends. You understand algorithms and platform behavior, but you are not boxed in by them.<\/li><li>You have a strong eye for social-first creative and understand what makes content compelling, whether you are directing, briefing, reviewing, or partnering with creators to produce it.<\/li><li>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re experienced working with creators and know how to write strong briefs, give clear feedback, and manage content from initial sourcing through final assets.<\/li><li>You can balance big, unexpected creative thinking with excellent execution, organization, and follow-through.<\/li><li>You have strong communication skills and are comfortable selling your ideas, navigating feedback, and working through approval processes.<\/li><li>You are highly detail-oriented and know how to distinguish between what needs to be perfect and what can move quickly.<\/li><li>You are excited by new platforms, communities, creative approaches, and the opportunity to help shape what Starface social can become.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>salary &amp; benefits<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>The compensation range for this role is a $90,000-$110,000 base depending on level of experience, as well as bonus eligibility.<\/li><li>Additional benefits include:<\/li><li>Access to high-quality health care options<\/li><li>Access to a 401k with 5% employer match eligibility<\/li><li>4 weeks of vacation plus up to 20 paid holidays<\/li><li>12 weeks fully paid parental leave<\/li><li>5 days of pet-ernity leave for pet adoption<\/li><li>Home office &amp; internet supplement stipend<\/li><li>Annual learning &amp; development stipend<\/li><li>Flexible Fridays, and Summer Fridays<\/li><li>Fully remote work environment<\/li><li>...and much, much more!<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><em>Starface is an Equal Opportunity Employer where the spirit of inclusion feeds into everything that we do. We are committed to providing an environment of mutual respect where equal employment opportunities are available to all applicants and teammates. We believe that opportunity, access, resources and rewards should be available to and for the benefit of all. Starface is committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship status, marital status, disability, gender identity, gender expression, and Veteran status.<\/em><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **HONEST** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). We formulate, produce, and market gut, digestive, and microbiome health supplements \u00e2\u0080\u0094 and performance marketing is a core growth driver for us.<br><br>This is not a brand or content role. It sits squarely in paid acquisition and performance creative. We're looking for a <strong>Creative Strategist with a direct-response mindset <\/strong>\u00e2\u0080\u0094 ideally someone who started as a copywriter and evolved into performance creative strategy.<br><br><strong>Part-time freelance contractor <br><br><\/strong><strong>B2C \/ DTC Experience Required<br><br><\/strong>EU hours (GMT)<br><br>Supplements \/ health a strong plus<br><br>This role is about what converts, not what \"looks good.\"<br><br>What you'll actually do<br><br><ul><li>Own performance creative strategy for paid media (Meta-focused)<\/li><li>Develop angles, hooks, messaging frameworks, and iterations<\/li><li>Translate data (CTR, CPA, CVR, ROAS) into creative decisions<\/li><li>Build and refine creative testing roadmaps<\/li><li>Brief and iterate with copywriters, editors, and designers<\/li><li>Analyze winning vs losing creatives and scale what works<\/li><li>Continuously improve performance through structured experimentation<br><br><\/li><\/ul>What we're looking for<br><br><ul><li>Proven experience in performance marketing creative<\/li><li>Strong copy background (ads, hooks, messaging \u00e2\u0080\u0094 not just concepts)<\/li><li>Hands-on experience working with media buyers<\/li><li>Comfort owning results, not just deliverables<\/li><li>Clear understanding of direct-response psychology<\/li><li>Ability to move fast, test often, and iterate<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Senior-level experience in performance creative and\/or direct-response copywriting<\/li><li>Proven exposure to paid media environments (Meta experience required)<\/li><li>Strong understanding of conversion-focused creative and testing<\/li><li>Fluency in English (CVs must be submitted in English)<\/li><li>Ability to operate independently in a fast-paced, remote setup<\/li><li>Available during EU working hours (GMT)<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Why Happy Mammoth<br><br><ul><li>Competitive compensation aligned with senior performance roles<\/li><li>Fully remote with clear ownership and accountability<\/li><li>Opportunity to work on high-impact, Gildan operates with a strong commitment to industry-leading labour, environmental and governance practices throughout its supply chain in accordance with its comprehensive ESG program embedded in Gildan's long-term business strategy. Together with our global team of dedicated employees, Gildan is united in its vision of Making Apparel Better\u00c2\u00ae. Discover the full scale of Gildan and prepare to be surprised at gildancorp.com .<br><br><strong> The opportunity <br><br><\/strong>The Customer Routing Analyst is required to support all routing and customer compliance for Retail. The position sits within the Planning and Scheduling Department, reporting directly to the Manager, Customer Routing.<br><br><strong>The role<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Assist in supporting major accounts (i.e., contact accounts regarding delayed carrier pickups, communicate with sales regarding routing issues, etc.)<\/li><li>Adhere to customer specific routing guides to ensure compliance by routing and distribution teams for assigned accounts. <\/li><li>Work with internal teams to prioritize receipt of product given account specific routing requirements, considering processing and order timing.<\/li><li>Maintain routing table updates and ongoing maintenance.<\/li><li>Organize and maintain current vendor routing guides. <\/li><li>Assist DC Logistics Clerks to handle certain customer specific requirements during and after the shipment has been processed.<\/li><li>Route and communicate via certain customer specific routing portals.<\/li><li>Follow up and assist in troubleshooting shipping issues (i.e. picking\/packing errors, delays, misguided freight, label issues, chargeback\/penalties, etc).<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>The Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Bachelor's Degree in Supply Chain\/Logistics or any related discipline<\/li><li>At least 3 years' experience in a supply chain or related environment<\/li><li>Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook<\/li><li>Expressed problem solving skill; able to gather and analyze information at a high level <\/li><li>Excellent verbal and written communication skill<\/li><li>Ability to speak and present information in a clear concise way in front of customers<\/li><li>Proven ability to prioritize information, work activities, use of time, resources<\/li><li>Ability to work in a team-based environment<\/li><li>High level of interpersonal skill and professionalism required<\/li><li>Ability to work under demanding deadlines<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What's In It For You<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Join a publicly traded company dual-listed on NYSE and TSX with great potential<\/li><li>Be part of a workplace where meaningful connections and teamwork are celebrated<\/li><li>From local to international, be ready to work alongside a diverse group of colleagues<\/li><li>Benefit from mentorship and continuous development opportunities<\/li><li>Take advantage of our attractive benefits packages<br><br><\/li><\/ul>We want to get to know you better! Please include your transferrable skills and unique experience in your application to help us learn more about you.<br><br>We thank all applicants for their interest, however, only those selected for interviews will be contacted.<br><br><strong> Find your fit with us <br><br><\/strong>We are committed to ensuring that everyone, across every background and identity, feels respected, supported, and able to thrive. Come as you are and #FindYourFit at Gildan. With headquarters in Jackson, Wyoming, Stio draws inspiration from the surrounding Teton Range and offers product via Stio.com, catalog, B2B and its Mountain Studio\u00c2\u00ae retail locations.<br><br>We live and love mountain life, and as such see ourselves as caretakers of the resources that provide it. We are proud partners of Protect Our Winters and the Conservation Alliance among many other organizations. We have a strong preferred materials platform, use Bluesign\u00c2\u00ae approved textiles wherever possible, audit our supply chains for best practices, and operate our workplaces responsibly.<br><br>We think that outside is the best side and that you can't improve on nature. It's good for mind, body and soul, and it's our responsibility to help enable access for all people, regardless of race, gender, beliefs, background or ability. We strive for inclusion at Stio and in our local and national communities.<br><br><strong>YOUR ROLE<br><br><\/strong>The Creative Operations Manager is the organizational engine behind Stio's creative function, the person who makes sure great work gets made efficiently, consistently, and on time. This role owns the systems, workflows, and processes that keep the creative team running at full capacity across every season, channel, and workstream.<br><br>Reporting to the Associate Creative Director, you will partner closely with Brand, Performance, E-commerce, Retail and Product teams to manage the full creative project pipeline, maintain asset and resource workflows, and ensure Stio's growing library of creative assets is organized, accessible, and channel-ready. This is a role for someone who takes genuine pride in building the machine and keeping it humming.<br><br><strong>Your Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Project &amp; Traffic Management<\/li><ul><li>Own the creative team's full project pipeline from brief intake through final delivery. Managing priorities, timelines, and stakeholder alignment across every workstream<\/li><li>Build and maintain detailed workback calendars across seasonal campaigns, product launches, channel executions, and evergreen creative needs<\/li><li>Serve as the primary coordination point between Creative and cross-functional partners including Brand Marketing, Digital, E-commerce, Retail, and Product<\/li><li>Facilitate project kick-offs, weekly check-ins, and milestone reviews with clear agendas and action-oriented follow-ups<\/li><li>Track and communicate project status, team bandwidth, and key deadlines to creative leadership; surface roadblocks early and help resolve them<\/li><li>Partner with the go-to-market team to ensure creative production timelines ladder up correctly to seasonal launch dates<\/li><\/ul><li>Process &amp; Operations<\/li><ul><li>Own, maintain, and continuously improve Stio's creative workflow systems including Asana project architecture, intake processes, and team operating rhythms<\/li><li>Establish and enforce consistent brief standards, ensuring clarity and completeness before work begins to reduce revision cycles<\/li><li>Lead creative capacity planning. Balancing workload across the team, setting realistic expectations, and advocating for the team's bandwidth<\/li><li>Identify process inefficiencies and implement solutions that bring structure and consistency to how work moves through the creative function<\/li><li>Champion adoption of AI tools across the creative team. Identifying opportunities to streamline production, automate repeatable tasks, and improve output quality<\/li><\/ul><li>Asset &amp; Resource Management<\/li><ul><li>Own Stio's Digital Asset Management platform (Bynder) overseeing asset organization, taxonomy, standards, and team adoption<\/li><li>Establish and maintain DAM governance: naming conventions, metadata standards, folder architecture, and asset lifecycle management<\/li><li>Ensure seasonal creative assets are properly organized, tagged, and accessible to cross-functional stakeholders and channel teams in a timely manner<\/li><li>Co-manage relationships with external freelancers, photographers, and creative vendors \u00e2\u0080\u0094 coordinating contracts, timelines, and deliverables<\/li><li>Track and process vendor and freelancer invoices accurately and on time, in partnership with ACD and other key stakeholders<\/li><\/ul><li>Strategic Support<\/li><ul><li>Partner with the Associate Creative Director on seasonal planning, resource allocation, and team capacity strategy<\/li><li>Contribute to post-project retrospectives and lessons-learned sessions translating insights into process improvements<\/li><li>Bring a data-informed perspective to creative operations: tracking on-time delivery rates, revision cycles, and team throughput to inform continuous improvement<\/li><li>Support onboarding of new creative team members and partners into Stio's tools, workflows, and operating standards<br><br><\/li><\/ul><\/ul><strong>Your Skills And Experience<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>3+ years of experience managing creative or marketing workflows, ideally within an in-house creative team, brand, or agency environment<\/li><li>Proven track record of building and maintaining project management systems. You've designed the process, not just followed it<\/li><li>Proficient in Asana or similar; experienced in building project architecture, templates, and team workflows from the ground up<\/li><li>Hands-on experience with a Digital Asset Management platform (Bynder strongly preferred); comfortable owning DAM governance and driving team adoption<\/li><li>Fluent with AI tools and actively curious about how they can improve creative production workflows. You're not waiting to be told, you're already experimenting<\/li><li>Strong brief-writing instincts. You know what makes a brief clear enough to actually brief from, and you're not afraid to push back when it isn't<\/li><li>Clear, confident communicator who can translate strategy into process and process into action across creative and non-creative stakeholders<\/li><li>Highly organized, solutions-oriented, and calm under pressure, the kind of person who steadies the room when priorities shift<\/li><li>Comfortable holding the team accountable without micromanaging; skilled at keeping momentum through a creative personality mix<\/li><li>Experience working with consumer-facing brands in apparel, outdoor, lifestyle, or adjacent categories preferred<\/li><li>Genuine affinity for mountain lifestyle and the values that drive the Stio brand<\/li><li>Commitment to our company mission, vision, and values<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>THE FINE PRINT<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Must be able to work in a stationary position 75% of the work day <\/li><li>Medical, Dental Vision plans<\/li><li>Company Paid Long Term Disability<\/li><li>Employee Assistance Programs<\/li><li>401k with Match<\/li><li>Generous paid time off policies<\/li><li>Gear test, perks and more<br><br><\/li><\/ul>We provide competitive compensation packages, inclusive of base pay, incentives and benefits. The base salary range for this role is $65,000-$75,000. It would not be typical for someone to be hired at the top end of the range for the role, as actual pay will be determined based on several factors including experience, skills, and qualifications.<br><br>This job description is not necessarily an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, skills, duties, requirements, efforts, or working conditions associated with the job. While this is intended to be an accurate reflection of the current job, we reserve the right to revise the job or to require that other or different tasks be performed. With headquarters in Jackson, Wyoming, Stio draws inspiration from the surrounding Teton Range and offers product via Stio.com, catalog, B2B and its Mountain Studio\u00c2\u00ae retail locations.<br><br>We live and love mountain life, and as such see ourselves as caretakers of the resources that provide it. We are proud partners of Protect Our Winters and the Conservation Alliance among many other organizations. We have a strong preferred materials platform, use Bluesign\u00c2\u00ae approved textiles wherever possible, audit our supply chains for best practices, and operate our workplaces responsibly.<br><br>We think that outside is the best side and that you can't improve on nature. It's good for mind, body and soul, and it's our responsibility to help enable access for all people, regardless of race, gender, beliefs, background or ability. We strive for inclusion at Stio and in our local and national communities.<br><br><strong>YOUR ROLE<br><br><\/strong>The Art Director, Brand &amp; Concepts is responsible for shaping how Stio looks and feels across every touchpoint from seasonal campaigns and product launches to brand identity, packaging, retail environments, and events. This role partners closely with the Associate Creative Director to develop and execute brand and seasonal product marketing creative that is visually distinctive, emotionally resonant, and deeply rooted in mountain life.<br><br>This is a role for a creative who brings both a strong conceptual point of view and the executional range to bring ideas to life at a high level. Someone who can pitch a campaign concept to senior leadership just as confidently as they can translate it into a finished asset, and who is equally at home on location, art directing lifestyle photo and video productions alongside photographers, stylists, filmmakers, models, and athletes.<br><br><strong>Your Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Brand Creative &amp; Identity<\/li><ul><li>Own and evolve Stio's visual identity across brand guidelines, logo systems, typography, color, and design standards<\/li><li>Develop and maintain brand creative systems that ensure consistency across all channels while leaving room for freshness and evolution<\/li><li>Bring a strong point of view to every project \u00e2\u0080\u0094 knowing how to make work that feels distinctly Stio, not just on-trend<\/li><\/ul><li>Campaign Concepting<\/li><ul><li>Lead creative concepting for seasonal campaigns and product launches in partnership with the Associate Creative Director<\/li><li>Translate brand strategy and seasonal briefs into compelling visual concepts \u00e2\u0080\u0094 from mood boards and visual frameworks through final execution<\/li><li>Pitch creative ideas to senior leadership with confidence, clarity, and a compelling narrative<\/li><li>Balance brand-building ambition with commercial effectiveness and channel realities<\/li><\/ul><li>Packaging &amp; Collateral<\/li><ul><li>Art direct and execute packaging design across product categories, ensuring consistency with brand identity<\/li><li>Develop brand collateral, hang tags, labels, and print materials that reflect Stio's quality standards and aesthetic<\/li><\/ul><li>New Stores &amp; Events<\/li><ul><li>Partner with retail and marketing teams to develop creative for new Mountain Studio store openings, in-store environments, and brand events<\/li><li>Bring cohesive visual storytelling to physical brand moments \u00e2\u0080\u0094 from signage and fixtures to event graphics and experiential touch points<\/li><\/ul><li>Video &amp; Storyboarding<\/li><ul><li>Develop storyboards and visual treatments for video and motion creative in support of campaign concepts<\/li><li>Collaborate with production partners and internal stakeholders to bring video creative to life on-brand and on-brief<\/li><\/ul><li>Cross-Functional Collaboration<\/li><ul><li>Work closely with Brand Marketing, Digital, E-commerce, Product, and Retail teams to ensure creative consistency across all channels<\/li><li>Contribute to creative briefs, reviews, and feedback processes \u00e2\u0080\u0094 elevating work through clear direction and high craft standards<\/li><li>Mentor and provide creative direction to internal designers and senior designers<\/li><li>Manage and direct freelancers, external designers, and creative partners as needed<br><br><\/li><\/ul><\/ul><strong>Your Skills And Experience<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>7+ years of experience in art direction or graphic design, with a portfolio spanning brand campaigns, identity, and digital creative<\/li><li>Experience at a consumer brand in outdoor, apparel, activewear, lifestyle, or adjacent categories<\/li><li>Strong visual instincts and a clear, differentiated point of view. You know the difference between work that's good and work that's great<\/li><li>Experience art directing lifestyle photo and video productions on-location leading shoots alongside photographers, stylists, filmmakers, models, and athletes making clear, confident creative decisions in a fast-moving environment<\/li><li>Proven ability to concept and lead campaigns from brief through final delivery<\/li><li>Confident and compelling when presenting creative to senior stakeholders. You can tell the story of your work<\/li><li>Sharp sense for copy and messaging; you understand how words and visuals work together<\/li><li>Experienced in storyboarding and developing visual treatments for video and motion content<\/li><li>Deep understanding of typography, layout, photography, design systems, and brand expression across print and digital<\/li><li>Demonstrated ability to provide direction and constructive feedback to designers at varying skill levels, with a collaborative mentorship style<\/li><li>Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign) and Figma; comfortable with evolving AI creative tools<\/li><li>Highly organized, self-directed, and energized by building creative in a fast-moving, collaborative environment<\/li><li>Authentically connected to mountain lifestyle, outdoor culture, and the values that drive the Stio brand<\/li><li>Commitment to our company mission, vision, and values<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>THE FINE PRINT<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Must be able to work in a stationary position 75% of the work day <\/li><li>Medical, Dental Vision plans<\/li><li>Company Paid Long Term Disability<\/li><li>Employee Assistance Programs<\/li><li>401k with Match<\/li><li>Generous paid time off policies<\/li><li>Gear test, perks and more<\/li><li>Must be able and willing to travel up to 4-6 weeks per year<br><br><\/li><\/ul>We provide competitive compensation packages, inclusive of base pay, incentives and benefits. The base salary range for this role is $85,000-$100,000. It would not be typical for someone to be hired at the top end of the range for the role, as actual pay will be determined based on several factors including experience, skills, and qualifications.<br><br>This job description is not necessarily an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, skills, duties, requirements, efforts, or working conditions associated with the job. Que cuando un estudiante dice \u00c2\u00abno entiendo este concepto de IA o Crypto\u00c2\u00bb , t\u00c3\u00ba ya est\u00c3\u00a1s pensando en la analog\u00c3\u00ada perfecta para explic\u00c3\u00a1rselo. Que el estancamiento de un alumno no te deja dormir y que dise\u00c3\u00b1ar un acompa\u00c3\u00b1amiento proactivo y personalizado es, literalmente, tu vocaci\u00c3\u00b3n.<br><br><strong>D\u00c3\u00a9janos Explicarte C\u00c3\u00b3mo Empezamos<br><br><\/strong>Imag\u00c3\u00adnate a un par de locos que se hartaron de la t\u00c3\u00adpica educaci\u00c3\u00b3n encorsetada. Nos dimos cuenta de que ense\u00c3\u00b1ar de verdad significa dar a cada persona el poder de crear, crecer y reinventarse sin depender de nadie m\u00c3\u00a1s. As\u00c3\u00ad que dimos un paso al frente para reescribir las reglas de la educaci\u00c3\u00b3n tradicional.<br><br>Hoy nos hemos convertido en el centro universitario que menos se parece a un centro universitario, consolid\u00c3\u00a1ndonos como la mayor comunidad hispanohablante del mundo en tecnolog\u00c3\u00adas disruptivas con m\u00c3\u00a1s de 1.000.000 de alumnos en casi 40 pa\u00c3\u00adses.<br><br>Nuestra misi\u00c3\u00b3n es clara: empoderar a las personas a trav\u00c3\u00a9s de experiencias de aprendizaje transformadoras que les ayuden a comprender y aprovechar las tecnolog\u00c3\u00adas de la era exponencial.<br><br>Learning Heroes est\u00c3\u00a1 creciendo. Mucho. Y para sostener este crecimiento, estamos buscando a una persona que sea una m\u00c3\u00a1quina de la motivaci\u00c3\u00b3n y el soporte ; un <strong>Coach Acad\u00c3\u00a9mico<\/strong> puro enfocado en guiar, acompa\u00c3\u00b1ar y asegurar que nuestros estudiantes vayan <em>\"From Zero to Hero\"<\/em> con total \u00c3\u00a9xito.<br><br><strong>\u00c2\u00bfCu\u00c3\u00a1l ser\u00c3\u00ada tu rol?<br><br><\/strong>La misi\u00c3\u00b3n es simple: garantizar que cada alumno de Learning Heroes cuente con el soporte, el empuje y el acompa\u00c3\u00b1amiento necesarios para completar su formaci\u00c3\u00b3n con \u00c3\u00a9xito. Eres el puente humano entre el \u00c3\u00a1rea de formaci\u00c3\u00b3n y el estudiante. Tu objetivo no es solo \"responder dudas de soporte\" ; es hacer un seguimiento proactivo e inteligente, maximizar la tasa de finalizaci\u00c3\u00b3n de los programas, disparar el <em>engagement<\/em> y asegurar que nadie se quede atr\u00c3\u00a1s en el camino. Gracias a ti, la experiencia formativa ser\u00c3\u00a1 excelente y convertiremos a los alumnos en verdaderos h\u00c3\u00a9roes de las tecnolog\u00c3\u00adas disruptivas.<br><br><strong>Skills<br><br><\/strong>No buscamos a un mero administrador de plataforma. Buscamos a un\/a tutor\/a y gu\u00c3\u00ada motivado\/a con 4 skills cr\u00c3\u00adticas:<br><br><ul><li>Acompa\u00c3\u00b1amiento proactivo y empat\u00c3\u00ada pura: Eres un crack conectando con las personas. Te encargar\u00c3\u00a1s del onboarding acad\u00c3\u00a9mico de los nuevos estudiantes, explicando el funcionamiento del ecosistema , y mantendr\u00c3\u00a1s un seguimiento peri\u00c3\u00b3dico (por email, WhatsApp o videollamada). Tienes un radar natural para detectar bloqueos o dificultades antes de que el alumno se frustre , aplicando estrategias personalizadas para motivarlo y reducir el abandono.<\/li><li>Pasi\u00c3\u00b3n por el soporte t\u00c3\u00a9cnico-acad\u00c3\u00a9mico: Te entusiasma y tienes un gran inter\u00c3\u00a9s por las tecnolog\u00c3\u00adas disruptivas (IA, Trading, Crypto, entre otras). No te asusta resolver dudas sobre estos contenidos y eres capaz de guiar desde un perfil principiante hasta usuarios avanzados. Adem\u00c3\u00a1s, sabes exactamente cu\u00c3\u00a1ndo derivar de forma \u00c3\u00a1gil las dudas m\u00c3\u00a1s complejas hacia los formadores o el equipo t\u00c3\u00a9cnico.<\/li><li>Visi\u00c3\u00b3n de mejora continua y dinamizaci\u00c3\u00b3n: Entiendes que el feedback de los alumnos es oro. Trabajar\u00c3\u00a1s codo con codo con los equipos de Formaci\u00c3\u00b3n, Producto y Soporte para optimizar materiales, procesos y la experiencia general del estudiante. Te encanta participar en la creaci\u00c3\u00b3n de din\u00c3\u00a1micas de engagement, gamificaci\u00c3\u00b3n e iniciativas de comunidad para mantener a los alumnos activos y aprovechando las clases en vivo, grabaciones y materiales.<\/li><li>Autonom\u00c3\u00ada, organizaci\u00c3\u00b3n y control de m\u00c3\u00a9tricas (Accountability): Te mueves r\u00c3\u00a1pido en entornos din\u00c3\u00a1micos y dominas la gesti\u00c3\u00b3n interna. Mantendr\u00c3\u00a1s el CRM y los sistemas de seguimiento al d\u00c3\u00ada , reportando m\u00c3\u00a9tricas clave como la asistencia, satisfacci\u00c3\u00b3n, interacci\u00c3\u00b3n y tasas de finalizaci\u00c3\u00b3n. Tienes experiencia previa (de 1 a 3 a\u00c3\u00b1os) en atenci\u00c3\u00b3n al alumno, customer success o coaching acad\u00c3\u00a9mico, idealmente en startups o proyectos educativos digitales.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>\u00c2\u00bfD\u00c3\u00b3nde y c\u00c3\u00b3mo trabajamos?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Modalidad: Modelo de trabajo Remoto 100% LATAM<\/li><li>Contrato y Jornada: Horario flexible, media jornada a 20 horas semanales. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>\u00c2\u00bfQu\u00c3\u00a9 ofrecemos?<br><br><\/strong>Si Has Llegado Hasta Aqu\u00c3\u00ad Es Porque Te Apasiona La Educaci\u00c3\u00b3n, El Trato Con Las Personas y Quieres Ser El\/la Responsable Directo\/a De Que Nuestros Alumnos Transformen Sus Vidas. Adem\u00c3\u00a1s<br><br><ul><li>Desarrollo: Formaci\u00c3\u00b3n gratuita en nuestros programas de IA, Trading y Crypto. Queremos que domines la materia y vivas la misma experiencia que nuestros estudiantes.<\/li><li>Impacto y cultura: Aqu\u00c3\u00ad no eres un simple gestor, eres el motor que impulsa el \u00c3\u00a9xito de la comunidad. Valoramos a cada persona como un H\u00c3\u0089ROE \u00c3\u00banico y fomentamos la creatividad y el intercambio de ideas.<\/li><li>Teambuilding: Hacemos cosas muy chulas para conectar con el equipo y celebrar juntos cada hito.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Si tienes ganas de darle ca\u00c3\u00b1a, de liderar el \u00c3\u00a9xito de miles de estudiantes en una empresa que no para de escalar, y unirte a un entorno din\u00c3\u00a1mico con prop\u00c3\u00b3sito, \u00c2\u00a1aplica!<br><br>Xavi y Arnau<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **RAPTUROUSLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). nomad","virtual assistant","hr","education","legal"],"description":"<p>An AI firm is seeking an Executive Assistant that can sit remote. <\/p><p> <\/p><p><strong>Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Manage complex executive calendars, scheduling, and meeting logistics across multiple global time zones and external stakeholders.<\/li><li>Provide high-level executive support and administrative coordination.<\/li><li>Coordinate travel, expenses, and day-to-day operations.<\/li><li>Track projects, deadlines, and action items, proactively following up and identifying potential risks or delays.<\/li><li>Leverage AI tools for research, document summaries, communications, meeting briefs, and project tracking.<\/li><li>Prepare professional, board-ready documents, presentations, and spreadsheets.<\/li><li>Support board and committee meetings by coordinating materials, logistics, and documentation.<\/li><li>Handle highly confidential governance, legal, HR, and compensation matters with discretion.<\/li><li>Serve as a key liaison across teams, ensuring seamless communication, alignment, and execution.<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Qualifications<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><ul><li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience<\/li><li>2+ years experience as an Executive Assistant<\/li><li>Experience working in Technology<\/li><li>Comfortable utilizing AI Tools<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>The annual base salary range is $75,000 to $95,000. We believe IT should be intelligently automated to enhance security, productivity, and cost-effectiveness\u00e2\u0080\u0094without compromising control or oversight. Achieving this requires deep technical expertise, strategic planning, and precise execution. With experience spanning software development, systems administration, and business operations, we design solutions that empower our clients to operate with confidence and agility.<br><br><strong>Summary<br><br><\/strong>As a Customer Support Technician on our Help Desk team, you will own the technical offboarding and access-deprovisioning lifecycle across our client organizations\u00e2\u0080\u0094nonprofits, tech startups, and small\/medium businesses. When someone leaves a company, you are the person who makes sure their access is removed quickly, completely, and accurately. Technical offboardings are time-sensitive, security-critical work, and owning them end to end is the core of this role.<br><br>Alongside that ownership, you'll provide tier-1 help desk support\u00e2\u0080\u0094onboardings, access and license requests, and general IT troubleshooting\u00e2\u0080\u0094and help keep our support queues moving at pace. This is a high-volume, fast-moving role built for someone who thrives on operational speed and gets satisfaction from a clean, well-run queue.<br><br><strong>Who You Are<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>You move fast and stay accurate -- you're comfortable working through high ticket volume (think 30 tickets a day, not 5) without losing precision<\/li><li>You have razor-sharp attention to detail, especially where access, security, and data are concerned. You understand that a single missed de-provisioning step is a real risk, not a rounding error<\/li><li>You're process-oriented and dependable: you follow checklists and protocols carefully, and you document your work so the next person can trust it<\/li><li>You can prioritize under pressure and keep a cool head when the queue fills up and new tickets keep landing<\/li><li>You're empathetic, patient, and communicate clearly and gracefully across multiple channels<\/li><li>You're early in your IT\/support career, technically curious, and eager to grow<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What you'll own (primary responsibilities)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Own the offboarding and termination process end to end: de-provision user accounts and revoke access across IAM platforms (Okta, JumpCloud, and similar) and SaaS tools, reclaim licenses, and confirm that access removal is complete and timely<\/li><li>Treat every offboarding as a security and compliance event: meet client SLAs for de-provisioning, keep accurate and auditable records, and ensure nothing is left active behind a departing user<\/li><li>Live coordination with client contacts during high-touch or sensitive offboardings: communicate in real time with client HR and security as needed in preparation for and throughout the offboarding process<\/li><li>Be the point person for the offboarding queue: monitor it, triage it, and keep it clear\u00e2\u0080\u0094this queue should never be an afterthought<\/li><li>Coordinate handoffs with other teams (for example, hardware return logistics) without owning the hardware\/fulfillment queues yourself<\/li><li>Improve the playbook: refine and document offboarding workflows, checklists, and best practices as you go<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Supporting helpdesk work (secondary responsibilities)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Process IT onboardings and provision new-user accounts and access<\/li><li>Handle systems access and SaaS license requests<\/li><li>Provide light tier-1 software\/hardware troubleshooting<\/li><li>Monitor and triage general support queues during core work hours while meeting client SLAs<\/li><li>Build and maintain good professional rapport with end users<\/li><li>Diligently uphold client and internal protocols for IT security and access management<\/li><li>Collaborate with other internal teams on escalated issues and cross-functional projects<br><br><\/li><\/ul><em>Pixel Machinery is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. All employment decisions are based on business needs, job requirements, and individual qualifications, without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, gender identity, and sexual orientation), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other status protected by federal, state, or local laws.<br><br><\/em><em>The base salary range for this position is $60,000-72,000 per year.<br><br><\/em><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Based in Pacific Time Zone<\/li><li>1-2 years in a help desk, IT support, or fast-paced operations role, or strong aptitude and a clear eagerness to grow into one<\/li><li>Comfort working at high volume and pace, with strong prioritization and time-management skills<\/li><li>A detail-driven, process-oriented mindset, particularly around access and security<\/li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication<\/li><li>Familiarity with the following, or the ability to ramp quickly:<\/li><ul><li>Jira Service Management (or a similar help desk ticketing system)<\/li><li>Slack, Teams, or equivalent<\/li><li>Google Workspace &amp; Microsoft 365<\/li><li>Mac &amp; Windows OS<\/li><li>Okta, JumpCloud, or other IAM\/identity solutions<\/li><li>MDM and RMM tools (a plus)<\/li><\/ul><li>Commitment to continuous learning, with the ability to quickly absorb and retain new information and apply it to decision-making<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Health, Dental, Vision Insurance<\/li><li>401k with company matching<\/li><li>Generous Paid Time Off<\/li><li>Work From Home<\/li><li>Training &amp; Development<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **SENSATIONS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"California, California, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-customer-support-technician-helpdesk-offboardings-amp-access-pixel-machinery-1134154","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-customer-support-technician-helpdesk-offboardings-amp-access-pixel-machinery-1134154"},{"slug":"remote-data-engineers-ey-1134306","id":"1134306","epoch":1782487028,"date":"2026-06-26T15:17:08+00:00","company":"EY","company_logo":"","position":"Data Engineers","tags":["exec","design","customer support","marketing","virtual assistant","finance","senior","excel","golang","medical","digital nomad","infosec","education","recruiter","sys admin","consulting","technical","testing","travel","scheme","content writing","ops","sales","engineer","legal","dev","mobile","controller","full time","video","saas","amazon","ecommerce","shopify","music","c","embedded","assembly","supervisor","microsoft","ads","payroll","game dev","telecom","cloud","speech","teaching","hr","stats","coordinator","ruby","accounting","bus dev","python","math"],"description":"At EY, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re all in to shape your future with confidence.<br><br>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.<br><br>Join EY and help to build a better working world.<br><br>At EY, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.<br><br>EY Malta supports leading organisations, including financial services clients, in delivering large-scale data transformation programmes.<br><br>As a Data Engineer, you will play a key role in designing, building and optimizing robust and scalable data pipelines and modern cloud-based data platforms. These platforms will enable trusted, high-quality data across the organization, for reporting, analytics and operational decision-making.<br><br>You will work as part of a multidisciplinary team spanning data engineering, architecture, data governance and business domains to contribute to complex, high-impact engagements across regulated and data-intensive environments.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Design, build and maintain scalable data pipelines<\/li><li> Ensure data quality, governance and auditability<\/li><li> Work with stakeholders to deliver data-driven solutions<\/li><li> Optimise data flows and ETL processes<\/li><li> Support cloud-based data platform development<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Skills And Attributes<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Bachelor\u00e2\u0080\u0099s and\/or master\u00e2\u0080\u0099s degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics, or another relevant subject<\/li><li> 3+ years of experience in data engineering, data platforms or ETL development<\/li><li> Strong proficiency in SQL and relational databases<\/li><li> Experience with ETL tools and data pipeline development<\/li><li> Experience with Python or another scripting language<\/li><li> Knowledge of data modelling and data warehousing concepts<\/li><li> Experience with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Fabric and Azure Databricks<\/li><li> Familiarity with data governance, data quality and lineage concepts<\/li><li> Ability to work with structured and unstructured data across modern and legacy platforms<\/li><li> Strong problem-solving and communication skills<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Certifications (optional)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Microsoft certifications on Data Engineering \/ Fabric<\/li><li> Databricks certification<\/li><li> Snowflake certification<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What We Offer<br><br><\/strong>At EY, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll develop you with future-focused skills and equip you with world-class experiences. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll empower you in a flexible environment, and fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams.<br><br>Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.<br><br><strong>EY | Building a better working world <br><br><\/strong>EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.<br><br>Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.<br><br>EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **FIERY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Msida, ","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-data-engineers-ey-1134306","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-data-engineers-ey-1134306"},{"slug":"remote-user-researcher-ministry-of-housing-communities-and-local-government-1134178","id":"1134178","epoch":1782486023,"date":"2026-06-26T15:00:23+00:00","company":"Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government","company_logo":"","position":"User Researcher","tags":["design","embedded","sys admin","infosec","technical","customer support","testing","dev","scheme","seo","exec","senior","recruiter","digital nomad"],"description":"Bristol, Darlington, Manchester, Wolverhampton<br><br><strong>Job Summary<br><br><\/strong><strong>We are MHCLG<br><br><\/strong>At the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG), we work on things that make a real difference to people\u00e2\u0080\u0099s lives. We have over 3,500 staff who are based in 20 offices across the UK.<br><br>Whether it's through the homes we live in, the work of local councils, or the communities we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re all part of, our work is central to the political agenda. With ambitious and far-reaching goals this year, there\u00e2\u0080\u0099s never been a more exciting time to join us.<br><br>The Local Digital team sits within the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government and supports councils across England to deliver more secure, user-centred, cost-effective local public services through open, collaborative and reusable work. A key part of our work is supporting the local government sector to be more cyber resilient and deliver on the ambition of the Government Cyber Security Strategy to be resilient to known vulnerabilities and attack methods no later than 2030.<br><br><strong>To Achieve This, We Work Closely With Councils To<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Understand the risk \u00e2\u0080\u0094 improving visibility of digital assets, assessing vulnerabilities, and sharing intelligence so councils and MHCLG can make informed decisions about how best to reduce cyber risk.<\/li><li>Manage the risk \u00e2\u0080\u0094 strengthening cyber security posture through continuous improvement, addressing systemic weaknesses, and coordinating effective incident response.<\/li><li>Strengthen partnerships \u00e2\u0080\u0094 promoting collaboration across local government and with national partners to reduce duplication, share resources, and build collective resilience.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><em>We are now seeking a User Researcher <\/em>that will support the development of the CAF (Cyber Assessment Framework) for local government, will build compelling stories about user needs across the sector, and work closely with colleagues to design and lead user research activities.<br><br>Please note - In addition to the above role in Local Digital, the department is also looking for an SEO user researcher to deliver across our Publishing team \u00e2\u0080\u0093 providing insight on the department\u00e2\u0080\u0099s internal and external publishing activities. This role will utilise the same skillset detailed in the below person specification. Appointable candidates not selected for the Local Digital role may be contacted regarding this opportunity.<br><br>Find out more about our Digital teams and what they are working on through our MHCLG Digital blog. <strong>Please note that MHCLG do not offer visa sponsorship and applicants will need a valid visa for the duration of your employment.<br><br><\/strong><strong>Job Description<br><br><\/strong>As a User Researcher, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll:<br><br><ul><li>Work as part of a design team to develop and improve the CAF for local government to meet the needs of different users<\/li><li>Ensure user research is conducted with a diverse range of users across the planning system and advocate for their needs when engaging with internal teams<\/li><li>Plan, design and conduct user research with key user groups to understand their needs and experiences and to understand how the implementation of policies or programmes are impacting them<\/li><li>Work with community and collaboration and engagement managers to gather intel about users\u00e2\u0080\u0099 experience using the CAF to inform prioritisation of service and product design<\/li><li>Support the development of routes to recruit participants for research and support the design of a feedback loop for our research and that inclusive research is embedded into all user research practices, ensuring research is conducted with a diverse range of users<\/li><li>Identify appropriate research methods to meet the aims of the research. Analyse and synthesise user research data to present clear user insights and actionable findings<\/li><li>Communicate user findings with a range of relevant stakeholders in a clear and engaging way, including senior officials, and advocate for the user needs and experiences using the CAF for local government<\/li><li>Support the team to develop strategic insights and recommendations from all user research conducted and ensuring user needs, confirming experiences and impacts are embedded into the system mapping and visualisation work<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>As a User Researcher, You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Work as part of a design team to develop and improve the CAF for local government to meet the needs of different users<\/li><li>Ensure user research is conducted with a diverse range of users across the planning system and advocate for their needs when engaging with internal teams<\/li><li>Plan, design and conduct user research with key user groups to understand their needs and experiences and to understand how the implementation of policies or programmes are impacting them<\/li><li>Work with community and collaboration and engagement managers to gather intel about users\u00e2\u0080\u0099 experience using the CAF to inform prioritisation of service and product design<\/li><li>Support the development of routes to recruit participants for research and support the design of a feedback loop for our research and that inclusive research is embedded into all user research practices, ensuring research is conducted with a diverse range of users<\/li><li>Identify appropriate research methods to meet the aims of the research. Analyse and synthesise user research data to present clear user insights and actionable findings<\/li><li>Communicate user findings with a range of relevant stakeholders in a clear and engaging way, including senior officials, and advocate for the user needs and experiences using the CAF for local government<\/li><li>Support the team to develop strategic insights and recommendations from all user research conducted and ensuring user needs, confirming experiences and impacts are embedded into the system mapping and visualisation work<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Person specification<br><br><strong>As a User Researcher, You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Have<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience or work as a user researcher in a complex policy or delivery environment with an excellent working knowledge of user-centered design practices<\/li><li>Knowledge of a range of qualitative research methods, knowing how to apply different methods for different projects<\/li><li>Experience in designing and delivering inclusive user research with a wide range of users<\/li><li>Skills to be able to involve internal stakeholders in user research activities including co-designing research with multidisciplinary team and raising awareness of the importance of conducting robust monitoring and evaluation of their work<\/li><li>Skills to be able to analyse research data to generate actionable and implementable insights involving teams to ensure buy-in for those findings<\/li><li>An ability to meet ambitious deadlines and deliver high-quality work on schedule, including research plans, playbacks and reports<\/li><li>The ability to present clear and compelling research insights to internal and external stakeholders in a range of formats that suite the audience and delivered in a way that teams can understand and use those insights<\/li><li>An understanding of and the ability to work with complexity, uncertainty and organisational constraints in a political context<\/li><li>Experience of working in an open and collaborative way as part of a multidisciplinary team<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Alongside your salary of \u00c2\u00a344,004, Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government contributes \u00c2\u00a312,747 towards you being a member of the Civil Service Defined Benefit Pension scheme.  Find out what benefits a Civil Service Pension provides (opens in a new window).<br><br>At MHCLG we offer many benefits that range from tailored career pathways and flexible working to MyLifestyle Childcare Voucher and Cycle to Work Schemes. For more information, please click here.<br><br>Artificial intelligence<br><br>Artificial intelligence can be a useful tool to support your application, however, all examples and statements provided must be truthful, factually accurate and taken directly from your own experience. Where plagiarism has been identified (presenting the ideas and experiences of others, or generated by artificial intelligence, as your own) applications may be withdrawn and internal candidates may be subject to disciplinary action. Please see our candidate guidance (opens in a new window) for more information on appropriate and inappropriate use.<br><br>Selection process details<br><br><strong>Application and Selection<br><br><\/strong>The application process will be split into 2 stages, testing the following Success Profiles:<br><br><strong>Behaviours<\/strong><strong> , <\/strong><strong>Experience<\/strong><strong> , <\/strong> <strong>Technical<br><br><\/strong><strong>Please <\/strong>ensure your CV does not contain any personally identifiable information.<br><br><strong>Note: <\/strong>We do not consider direct CV applications. All applications must be submitted via the provided application link.<br><br><strong>Important:<\/strong> Your CV and Cover Letter <em>must <\/em>be merged into a single document before uploading.<br><br><strong>Stage 1: Sift (CV &amp; Cover Letter)<br><br><\/strong><strong>Experience &amp; Technical:<\/strong> Your covering letter should be no more than 1 page referencing how you meet the criteria set out in the job description.<br><br>Most of our campaigns utilise multiple assessors and so it is possible that each of your answers would be viewed by different assessors.<br><br>In the event that we receive a large number of applications, we may conduct an initial sift using the lead sift question listed in the advert. Candidates who pass the initial sift may be progressed to a full sift, or progressed straight to interview.<br><br>Lead sift question (Experience): Tell us about a time you planned or adapted your research approach to make it more inclusive. What did you do, and what did you learn?<br><br><strong>Stage 2: Interview<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Behaviours: \"Communicating and influencing\", \"Working together\", \"Delivering at a pace\"<\/li><li>Experience: Experience questions will be based around the essential skills and criteria as listed in the job description.<\/li><li>Technical: Technical questions will be based around the essential skills and criteria as listed in the job description.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Sift and Interview Dates<br><br><\/strong>Sifting is envisaged to take place the week commencing 13th July 2026.<br><br>Interviews are envisaged to take place shortly after and are currently being held remotely via videocall.
